77	        self.skills_frontmatters = skills_frontmatters or load_all_skill_frontmatters()
78	
79	    def _get_entrypoint(self, helper_name: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
80	        """
81	        从已加载的 skills frontmatter 中找到某 helper 的 entrypoint 定义。
82	        约定：frontmatter.entrypoints.<helper_name> 存在则认为可调用。
83	        """
84	        for fm in self.skills_frontmatters:
85	            entrypoints = fm.get("entrypoints") or {}
86	            if not isinstance(entrypoints, dict):
87	                continue
88	            ep = entrypoints.get(helper_name)
89	            if isinstance(ep, dict):
90	                ep = dict(ep)
91	                ep["_skill_base_dir"] = fm.get("_skill_base_dir")
92	                ep["_skill_md_path"] = fm.get("_skill_md_path")
93	                return ep
94	        return None
95	
96	    def _invoke_skill_helper(
97	        self,
98	        helper_name: str,
99	        payload: Dict[str, Any],
100	        timeout: int = 30,
101	    ) -> Optional[Any]:
102	        """
103	        按 SKILL.md frontmatter.entrypoints.<helper_name> 的声明，通过 run_python_script 调用外置技能。
104	        I/O 约定：通过 input_json/output_json 文件交互，脚本/模块负责写 output_json。
105	        """
106	        if not self.run_script_executor:
107	            logger.debug("skill 调用跳过（未注入 run_script_executor）| helper=%s", helper_name)
108	            return None
109	        ep = self._get_entrypoint(helper_name)
110	        if not ep:
111	            logger.debug("skill 未命中 entrypoint（SKILL.md frontmatter 无定义）| helper=%s", helper_name)
112	            return None
113	
114	        skill_base_dir = ep.get("_skill_base_dir") or ""
115	        kind = (ep.get("kind") or "python").lower()
116	        module = ep.get("module")
117	        script = ep.get("script")
118	        args_tpl = ep.get("args") or []
119	        if not isinstance(args_tpl, list):
120	            return None
121	
122	        with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".json", delete=False, encoding="utf-8") as f_in:
123	            json.dump(payload, f_in, ensure_ascii=False)
124	            input_json = f_in.name
125	        with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".json", delete=False, encoding="utf-8") as f_out:
126	            # 先写空对象，脚本可覆盖
127	            f_out.write("{}")
128	            output_json = f_out.name
129	
130	        try:
131	            args = []
132	            for a in args_tpl:
133	                if not isinstance(a, str):
134	                    continue
135	                args.append(
136	                    a.replace("{baseDir}", skill_base_dir)
137	                    .replace("{input_json}", input_json)
138	                    .replace("{output_json}", output_json)
139	                )
140	
141	            if kind != "python":
142	                logger.debug("skill entrypoint kind 不支持，回退默认逻辑 | helper=%s | kind=%s", helper_name, kind)
143	                return None
144	
145	            result: Dict[str, Any]
146	            if module and isinstance(module, str) and module.strip():
147	                logger.debug(
148	                    "调用 skill(module) | helper=%s | module=%s | cwd=%s | args=%s",
149	                    helper_name,
150	                    module.strip(),
151	                    skill_base_dir,
152	                    args,
153	                )
154	                result = self.run_script_executor(module=module.strip(), args=args, cwd=skill_base_dir or None, timeout=timeout)
155	            elif script and isinstance(script, str) and script.strip():
156	                sp = script.replace("{baseDir}", skill_base_dir)
157	                logger.debug(
158	                    "调用 skill(script) | helper=%s | script=%s | cwd=%s | args=%s",
159	                    helper_name,
160	                    sp,
161	                    skill_base_dir,
162	                    args,
163	                )
164	                result = self.run_script_executor(script_path=sp, args=args, cwd=skill_base_dir or None, timeout=timeout)
165	            else:
166	                logger.debug("skill entrypoint 缺少 module/script，回退默认逻辑 | helper=%s", helper_name)
167	                return None
168	
169	            if not result.get("success"):
170	                logger.debug(
171	                    "skill 执行失败，回退默认逻辑 | helper=%s | returncode=%s | stderr=%s",
172	                    helper_name,
173	                    result.get("returncode"),
174	                    (result.get("stderr") or "")[:300],
175	                )
176	                return None
177	            try:
178	                out_obj = json.loads(Path(output_json).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
179	                if isinstance(out_obj, dict) and "result" in out_obj:
180	                    logger.debug(
181	                        "skill 执行成功并返回 result | helper=%s | result=%s",
182	                        helper_name,
183	                        out_obj.get("result"),
184	                    )
185	                    return out_obj.get("result")
186	            except Exception:
187	                logger.debug("skill 输出文件解析失败，回退默认逻辑 | helper=%s", helper_name)
188	                return None
189	            return None
190	        finally:
191	            Path(input_json).unlink(missing_ok=True)
192	            Path(output_json).unlink(missing_ok=True)
193	
194	    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
195	    # LLM 格式二分发：根据 LLM 返回的 skill_name 调用对应技能
196	    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
197	
198	    _NODE_SELECTION_SKILLS = frozenset({
199	        "choose_best_input_target",
200	        "choose_best_click_target",
201	        "choose_best_checkbox_target",
202	        "find_switch_in_row",
203	    })
204	
205	    _SELECTOR_BUILD_SKILLS = frozenset({
206	        "build_dropdown_option_selector",
207	        "build_el_select_trigger_selector",
208	        "build_checkbox_selector",
209	        "build_tree_checkbox_selector",
210	        "build_tree_node_selector",
211	    })
212	
213	    # component_type → skill_name（反向映射，用于自动检测）
214	    _COMPONENT_TYPE_TO_SKILL = {
215	        "select_trigger": "build_el_select_trigger_selector",
216	        "dropdown_option": "build_dropdown_option_selector",
217	        "checkbox": "build_checkbox_selector",
218	        "tree_checkbox": "build_tree_checkbox_selector",
219	        "tree_node": "build_tree_node_selector",
220	    }
221	
222	    # intent 关键词 → component_type
223	    _INTENT_COMPONENT_PATTERNS = [
224	        # el-select 触发器：须含「展开」类语境，避免与「下拉选项」混淆
225	        (["下拉框", "下拉菜单", "下拉栏"], "select_trigger", ["展开", "展开按钮"]),
226	        (["勾选", "取消勾选", "复选框", "checkbox"], "tree_checkbox", ["树", "tree", "treeitem", "节点"]),
227	        (["勾选", "取消勾选", "复选框", "checkbox", "选中", "取消选中"], "checkbox", []),
228	        (["下拉", "选项", "dropdown", "option", "select", "级联"], "dropdown_option", []),
229	        (["展开", "收起", "折叠", "树节点", "tree"], "tree_node", []),
230	    ]
231	
232	    # skill_name → component_structures 中的 component_type 键
233	    _SKILL_TO_COMPONENT_TYPE = {
234	        "build_dropdown_option_selector": "dropdown_option",
235	        "build_el_select_trigger_selector": "select_trigger",
236	        "build_checkbox_selector": "checkbox",
237	        "build_tree_checkbox_selector": "tree_checkbox",
238	        "build_tree_node_selector": "tree_node",
239	    }
240	
241	    def _dispatch_skill_from_llm(
242	        self,
243	        skill_name: str,
244	        base_node_index: Optional[int],
245	        semantic_dom: List[Dict[str, Any]],
246	        intent: str,
247	        action_type: Optional[str] = None,
248	        action_value: Optional[str] = None,
249	        component_library: Optional[str] = None,
250	        target_text: Optional[str] = None,
251	    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
252	        """
253	        根据 LLM 格式二返回的 skill_name 分发调用。
254	
255	        - 节点选择类（2A）：调用外置脚本返回精炼 node_index
256	        - selector 构建类（2B）：从 SKILL.md component_structures 中按需查找
257	          click_target 模板，替换 {{text}} 后返回 recommended_selector
258	
259	        Returns:
260	            {
261	                "node_index": int or None,
262	                "recommended_selector": str or None,
263	                "component_library": str or None,
264	            }
265	        """
266	        empty: Dict[str, Any] = {"node_index": None, "recommended_selector": None, "component_library": None}
267	
268	        if skill_name in self._NODE_SELECTION_SKILLS:
269	            payload: Dict[str, Any] = {
270	                "semantic_dom": semantic_dom,
271	                "base_node_index": base_node_index,
272	                "intent": intent,
273	            }
274	            if skill_name == "choose_best_input_target":
275	                payload["expected_text"] = action_value or ""
276	
277	            result = self._invoke_skill_helper(skill_name, payload)
278	            idx = None
279	            if isinstance(result, int):
280	                idx = result
281	            elif result is not None:
282	                try:
283	                    idx = int(result)
284	                except (ValueError, TypeError):
285	                    pass
286	            return {"node_index": idx if idx is not None else base_node_index, "recommended_selector": None, "component_library": None}
287	
288	        if skill_name in self._SELECTOR_BUILD_SKILLS:
289	            lib = (component_library or "unknown").strip()
290	            txt = (target_text or "").strip()
291	            comp_type = self._SKILL_TO_COMPONENT_TYPE.get(skill_name, "")
292	
293	            helper_sel = self._selector_from_build_helper(skill_name, semantic_dom, intent)
294	            if helper_sel:
295	                return {
296	                    "node_index": base_node_index,
297	                    "recommended_selector": helper_sel,
298	                    "component_library": lib,
299	                }
300	
301	            # 从 SKILL.md frontmatter 按需查找组件 HTML 结构 + 可点击元素 HTML
302	            structure = get_component_structure(self.skills_frontmatters, lib, comp_type)
303	            if structure and txt:
304	                selector = self._build_selector_via_llm(
305	                    component_library=lib,
306	                    component_type=comp_type,
307	                    target_text=txt,
308	                    html_structure=structure.get("html", ""),
309	                    click_target_html=structure.get("click_target", ""),
310	                )
311	                if selector:
312	                    logger.info(
313	                        "LLM 生成 selector | skill=%s | lib=%s | comp=%s | target_text=%s | selector=%s",
314	                        skill_name, lib, comp_type, txt, selector,
315	                    )
316	                    return {"node_index": base_node_index, "recommended_selector": selector, "component_library": lib}
317	                logger.warning("LLM 未能生成有效 selector，回退常规构建")
318	            else:
319	                if not structure:
320	                    logger.warning("未找到组件结构 | lib=%s | comp=%s，回退常规构建", lib, comp_type)
321	                if not txt:
322	                    logger.warning("LLM 未提供 target_text，回退常规构建")
323	            return {"node_index": base_node_index, "recommended_selector": None, "component_library": lib}
324	
325	        logger.warning("LLM 请求了未知技能: %s，忽略并回退", skill_name)
326	        return empty
327	
328	    def _invoke_selector_build_helper(
329	        self,
330	        skill_name: str,
331	        semantic_dom: List[Dict[str, Any]],
332	        intent: str,
333	    ) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
334	        """直接调用 general_component_library_skill 脚本助手（不依赖 run_script_executor）。"""
335	        if skill_name not in self._SELECTOR_BUILD_SKILLS:
336	            return None
337	        try:
338	            from pathlib import Path
339	            import sys
340	
341	            scripts_dir = (
342	                Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent
343	                / "skills"
344	                / "general_component_library_skill"
345	                / "scripts"
346	            )
347	            scripts_str = str(scripts_dir)
348	            if scripts_str not in sys.path:
349	                sys.path.insert(0, scripts_str)
350	            from ui_dom_helpers import (  # type: ignore[import-untyped]
351	                build_dropdown_option_selector,
352	                build_el_select_trigger_selector,
353	            )
354	
355	            if skill_name == "build_el_select_trigger_selector":
356	                result = build_el_select_trigger_selector(semantic_dom, intent)
357	            elif skill_name == "build_dropdown_option_selector":
358	                result = build_dropdown_option_selector(semantic_dom, intent)
359	            else:
360	                return None
361	            return result if isinstance(result, dict) else None
362	        except Exception as e:
363	            logger.debug("selector build helper 调用失败 | skill=%s | err=%s", skill_name, e)
364	            return None
365	
366	    def _selector_from_build_helper(
367	        self,
368	        skill_name: str,
369	        semantic_dom: List[Dict[str, Any]],
370	        intent: str,
371	    ) -> Optional[str]:
372	        result = self._invoke_selector_build_helper(skill_name, semantic_dom, intent)
373	        if not result:
374	            return None
375	        sel = result.get("selector")
376	        if sel and str(sel).strip():
377	            logger.info(
378	                "skill 脚本生成 selector | skill=%s | selector=%s",
379	                skill_name,
380	                str(sel)[:120],
381	            )
382	            return str(sel).strip()
383	        return None
384	
385	    def _build_selector_via_llm(
386	        self,
387	        component_library: str,
388	        component_type: str,
389	        target_text: str,
390	        html_structure: str,
391	        click_target_html: str,
392	    ) -> Optional[str]:
393	        """
394	        根据组件 HTML 结构和可点击元素 HTML 片段，调用 LLM 生成 XPath selector。
395	        """
396	        prompt = (
397	            f"根据以下信息，生成一个 Playwright 可用的 XPath selector。\n\n"
398	            f"组件库：{component_library}\n"
399	            f"组件类型：{component_type}\n"
400	            f"目标文本：{target_text}\n\n"
401	            f"该组件的典型 HTML 结构：\n{html_structure}\n\n"
402	            f"需要点击的元素（HTML 片段）：\n{click_target_html}\n\n"
403	            f"要求：\n"
404	            f"1. 用目标文本「{target_text}」做文本锚定（用 normalize-space(.) 或 contains）\n"
405	            f"2. 最终定位到「需要点击的元素」所描述的那个 HTML 元素\n"
406	            f"3. XPath 末尾加 [1] 确保唯一\n"
407	            f"4. 只输出一行纯 XPath 字符串，以 (// 开头，以 )[1] 结尾，不要输出其他任何内容\n"
408	        )
409	
410	        system = (
411	            "你是 XPath 构建专家。根据用户提供的 HTML 结构和需要点击的元素片段，"
412	            "生成精确的 XPath selector。只输出一行 XPath，不要解释。"
413	        )
414	
415	        try:
416	            raw = self.llm_client.llm.chat(prompt=prompt, system_prompt=system)
417	            xpath = raw.strip()
418	            # 清理可能的 markdown 代码块包裹
419	            if xpath.startswith("```"):
420	                # 处理 ```lang\nxpath``` 和 ```xpath``` 两种格式
421	                lines = xpath.split("\n", 1)
422	                if len(lines) > 1:
423	                    # 多行格式：第一行是 ```lang，取后续行
424	                    xpath = lines[-1]
425	                else:
426	                    # 单行格式：去掉开头 ``` 和可能的语言标识
427	                    xpath = xpath[3:]
428	                    # 去掉可能的语言标识（如 ```xpath//div）
429	                    if xpath and not xpath.startswith("/") and not xpath.startswith("("):
430	                        xpath = xpath.lstrip("abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz")
431	            if xpath.endswith("```"):
432	                xpath = xpath[:-3]
433	            xpath = xpath.strip().strip("`").strip('"').strip("'").strip()
434	
435	            if xpath and ("/" in xpath or "role=" in xpath):
436	                return xpath
437	            logger.debug("LLM 返回的 XPath 不合法: %s", xpath[:200])
438	            return None
439	        except Exception as e:
440	            logger.warning("调用 LLM 生成 XPath 失败: %s", e)
441	            return None
442	
443	    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
444	    # 自动检测：当 LLM 返回格式一时，系统主动尝试 skill 路径
445	    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
446	
447	    def _detect_component_library_from_dom(
448	        self,
449	        semantic_dom: List[Dict[str, Any]],
450	    ) -> Optional[str]:
451	        """从 semantic DOM 元素的 class 中识别组件库（基于 SKILL.md 的 class_features）。"""
452	        class_features_map: Dict[str, List[str]] = {}
453	        for fm in self.skills_frontmatters:
454	            structs = fm.get("component_structures")
455	            if not isinstance(structs, dict):
456	                continue
457	            for lib_name, lib_conf in structs.items():
458	                if not isinstance(lib_conf, dict):
459	                    continue
460	                features = lib_conf.get("class_features")
461	                if isinstance(features, list):
462	                    class_features_map[lib_name] = [str(f).lower() for f in features]
463	
464	        if not class_features_map:
465	            return None
466	
467	        hit_counts: Dict[str, int] = {}
468	        for node in semantic_dom:
469	            cls = str(node.get("class") or node.get("className") or "").lower()
470	            if not cls:
471	                attrs = node.get("attributes") or {}
472	                cls = str(attrs.get("class") or "").lower()
473	            if not cls:
474	                continue
475	            for lib_name, prefixes in class_features_map.items():
476	                for prefix in prefixes:
477	                    if prefix in cls:
478	                        hit_counts[lib_name] = hit_counts.get(lib_name, 0) + 1
479	                        break
480	
481	        if not hit_counts:
482	            return None
483	        return max(hit_counts, key=hit_counts.get)
484	
485	    def _detect_component_type_from_intent(
486	        self,
487	        intent: str,
488	        action_type: Optional[str],
489	    ) -> Optional[str]:
490	        """
491	        根据 intent 关键词和 action_type 推断组件类型。
492	        只对 click 类动作检测 selector 构建类组件。
493	        """
494	        if action_type and action_type not in ("click", "fill", "check", "uncheck", "toggle", "select"):
495	            return None
496	
497	        lower_intent = intent.lower()
498	
499	        for keywords, comp_type, context_keywords in self._INTENT_COMPONENT_PATTERNS:
500	            if any(kw in lower_intent for kw in keywords):
501	                if context_keywords:
502	                    if any(ck in lower_intent for ck in context_keywords):
503	                        return comp_type
504	                else:
505	                    return comp_type
506	        return None
507	
508	    @staticmethod
509	    def _extract_target_text_from_intent(intent: str) -> Optional[str]:
510	        """
511	        从 intent 中提取目标文本，支持多种引号和常见句式。
512	        例如 '勾选菜单根复选框' → '菜单根'，'选择下拉选项「北京」' → '北京'
513	        """
514	        import re
515	        # 引号包裹的文本优先
516	        for pat in (
517	            r'[「"\'](.*?)[」"\'"]',
518	            r'选[择中](?:下拉)?(?:选项|项)?[：:]*\s*(.+?)(?:\s|$)',
519	        ):
520	            m = re.search(pat, intent)
521	            if m and m.group(1).strip():
522	                return m.group(1).strip()
523	
524	        # Element Plus el-select 触发器：从「弹窗中的分类标签下拉框」类句式取字段名
525	        for pat in (
526	            r"(?:弹窗|对话框|抽屉|窗口)中的\s*[\"']?(.+?)[\"']?\s*下拉框",
527	            r"(?:弹窗|对话框|抽屉|窗口)中的\s*[\"']?(.+?)[\"']?\s*下拉菜单",
528	            r"(?:弹窗|对话框|抽屉|窗口)中的\s*[\"']?(.+?)[\"']?\s*下拉栏",
529	            r"中的\s*[\"']?(.+?)[\"']?\s*下拉框\s*展开",
530	            r"中的\s*[\"']?(.+?)[\"']?\s*下拉菜单\s*展开",
531	        ):
532	            m = re.search(pat, intent)
533	            if m and m.group(1).strip():
534	                lab = m.group(1).strip().strip('"\'')
535	                if 1 <= len(lab) <= 50:
536	                    return lab
537	
538	        # 关键词后的名词提取（树/节点等前缀会被剥离）
539	        suffix_patterns = [
540	            r'(?:勾选|取消勾选|选中|取消选中)\s*(?:树节点|树|节点)?\s*(.+?)(?:的?复选框|checkbox|$)',
541	            r'(?:下拉|dropdown).*?选[择中]\s*(.+?)(?:\s|$)',
542	        ]
543	
544	        for pat in suffix_patterns:
545	            m = re.search(pat, intent, re.IGNORECASE)
546	            if m and m.group(1).strip():
547	                return m.group(1).strip()
548	
549	        return None
550	
551	    @staticmethod
552	    def _extract_feature_menu_target_from_intent(intent: str) -> Optional[str]:
553	        """
554	        从 feature_titles 菜单导航 intent 中提取目标菜单名（优先取「...」中的文本）。
555	        例如：点击用于切换到「工作流」模块 -> 工作流
556	        """
557	        import re
558	        if not intent:
559	            return None
560	        for pattern in (r"「([^」]+)」", r'"([^"]+)"', r"'([^']+)'"):
561	            m = re.search(pattern, intent)
562	            if m and (m.group(1) or "").strip():
563	                return m.group(1).strip()
564	        return None
565	
566	    @staticmethod
567	    def _menu_node_matches_target(node: Dict[str, Any], target: str) -> bool:
568	        """菜单导航校验：节点语义必须包含目标菜单名。"""
569	        if not target:
570	            return True
571	        text = str(node.get("text") or "")
572	        name = str(node.get("name") or "")
573	        placeholder = str(node.get("placeholder") or "")
574	        aria = node.get("aria") or {}
575	        aria_label = str(aria.get("aria-label") or "") if isinstance(aria, dict) else ""
576	        merged = f"{text} {name} {placeholder} {aria_label}"
577	        return target in merged
578	
579	    def _try_auto_skill_selector(
580	        self,
581	        semantic_dom: List[Dict[str, Any]],
582	        intent: str,
583	        action_type: Optional[str],
584	        node_index: int,
585	    ) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
586	        """
587	        LLM 返回格式一后，系统主动检测是否可以走 skill 路径构建更精确的 selector。
588	
589	        Returns:
590	            {"recommended_selector": str, "component_library": str} 或 None
591	        """
592	        comp_type = self._detect_component_type_from_intent(intent, action_type)
593	        if not comp_type:
594	            return None
595	
596	        skill_name = self._COMPONENT_TYPE_TO_SKILL.get(comp_type)
597	        if not skill_name:
598	            return None
599	
600	        lib = self._detect_component_library_from_dom(semantic_dom)
601	        if not lib:
602	            logger.debug("自动 skill 检测：未能从 DOM 识别组件库，跳过")
603	            return None
604	
605	        target_text = self._extract_target_text_from_intent(intent)
606	        if not target_text:
607	            logger.debug("自动 skill 检测：未能从 intent 提取目标文本，跳过")
608	            return None
609	
610	        logger.info(
611	            "自动 skill 检测命中 | comp_type=%s | skill=%s | lib=%s | target_text=%s",
612	            comp_type, skill_name, lib, target_text,
613	        )
614	
615	        helper_sel = self._selector_from_build_helper(skill_name, semantic_dom, intent)
616	        if helper_sel:
617	            return {"recommended_selector": helper_sel, "component_library": lib}
618	
619	        structure = get_component_structure(self.skills_frontmatters, lib, comp_type)
620	        if not structure:
621	            logger.debug("自动 skill 检测：未找到组件结构 | lib=%s | comp=%s", lib, comp_type)
622	            return None
623	
624	        selector = self._build_selector_via_llm(
625	            component_library=lib,
626	            component_type=comp_type,
627	            target_text=target_text,
628	            html_structure=structure.get("html", ""),
629	            click_target_html=structure.get("click_target", ""),
630	        )
631	        if selector:
632	            logger.info(
633	                "自动 skill 生成 selector | lib=%s | comp=%s | target_text=%s | selector=%s",
634	                lib, comp_type, target_text, selector,
635	            )
636	            return {"recommended_selector": selector, "component_library": lib}
637	
638	        logger.debug("自动 skill 检测：LLM 未生成有效 selector")
639	        return None
640	
641	    def resolve(
642	        self,
643	        semantic_dom: List[Dict[str, Any]],
644	        intent: str,
645	        action_type: Optional[str] = None,
646	        action_value: Optional[str] = None,
647	        *,
648	        feature_titles_menu_nav: bool = False,
649	        excluded_selectors: Optional[List[str]] = None,
650	        resolver_hint: Optional[str] = None,
651	    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
652	        """
653	        根据语义 DOM 和动作意图选择目标元素节点
654	        
655	        Args:
656	            semantic_dom: 语义 DOM 元素列表（来自 semantic_dom.extract）
657	            intent: 动作意图描述
658	            action_type: 动作类型（fill、click、assert_text 等），用于过滤候选元素
659	            action_value: 动作的值（如 assert_text 的期望文本），用于更准确地选择元素
660	            feature_titles_menu_nav: 是否为 navigate_to_feature 的侧栏菜单点击；为 True 时若首轮
661	                confidence < 0.5 则不发起二次 LLM，并返回 node_index=None（上层不执行点击）。
662	                为 True 时模型可返回 ``skip_navigation``，由上层视为「不跳转」成功。
663	            resolver_hint: 步骤后校验失败时由策略 LLM 给出的解析线索，会写入 user prompt 供消歧。
664	        
665	        Returns:
666	            包含 node_index, reason, confidence 的字典：
667	            {
668	                "node_index": 元素在 semantic_dom 中的索引,
669	                "reason": "选择原因",
670	                "confidence": 0.0-1.0 之间的置信度
671	            }
672	        """
673	        if not semantic_dom:
674	            logger.warning("语义 DOM 为空，无法解析元素")
675	            return {"node_index": None, "reason": None, "confidence": 0.0}
676	        
677	        if not intent:
678	            logger.warning("动作意图为空，无法解析元素")
679	            return {"node_index": None, "reason": None, "confidence": 0.0}
680	        
681	        # 根据 action_type 预过滤候选元素
682	        filtered_dom = self._filter_by_action_type(semantic_dom, action_type)
683	        if not filtered_dom:
684	            logger.warning(f"根据 action_type={action_type} 过滤后，没有符合条件的候选元素")
685	            return {"node_index": None, "reason": f"没有符合 action_type={action_type} 的元素", "confidence": 0.0}
686	
687	        # 为过滤后的候选元素显式补充其在原始 semantic_dom 中的索引，
688	        # 提示 LLM 直接返回原始索引，避免后续做 filtered -> original 的复杂映射。
689	        annotated_filtered_dom: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
690	        original_index_by_id = {id(element): idx for idx, element in enumerate(semantic_dom)}
691	        for fi, filtered_element in enumerate(filtered_dom):
692	            original_index = original_index_by_id.get(id(filtered_element))
693	            if original_index is None:
694	                try:
695	                    original_index = semantic_dom.index(filtered_element)
696	                except ValueError:
697	                    original_index = fi
698	            enriched = dict(filtered_element)
699	            enriched["original_index"] = original_index
700	            annotated_filtered_dom.append(enriched)
701	        
702	        try:
703	            # 构建 USER PROMPT（使用过滤后的元素列表）
704	            user_prompt = self._build_user_prompt(
705	                annotated_filtered_dom,
706	                intent,
707	                action_type,
708	                action_value,
709	                feature_titles_menu_nav=feature_titles_menu_nav,
710	                excluded_selectors=excluded_selectors,
711	                resolver_hint=resolver_hint,
712	            )
713	            # 调用 LLM 进行元素选择
714	            raw_response = self.llm_client.llm.chat(
715	                prompt=user_prompt,
716	                system_prompt=RUNTIME_SYSTEM_PROMPT
717	            )
718	            
719	            # 解析 LLM 响应
720	            result = self._parse_response(raw_response)
721	
722	            if result.get("skip_navigation") and not feature_titles_menu_nav:
723	                logger.info("忽略非菜单导航场景下的 skip_navigation，按无有效 node 继续解析")
724	                result = {"node_index": None, "reason": None, "confidence": 0.0}
725	            elif feature_titles_menu_nav and result.get("skip_navigation"):
726	                logger.info(
727	                    "菜单导航：模型选择不跳转 | reason=%s",
728	                    (result.get("reason") or "")[:200],
729	                )
730	                return {
731	                    "node_index": None,
732	                    "skip_navigation": True,
733	                    "reason": str(result.get("reason") or "").strip(),
734	                    "confidence": float(result.get("confidence", 1.0)),
735	                }
736	
737	            # ── 格式二：LLM 请求调用技能 ──
738	            use_skill = result.get("use_skill")
739	            if isinstance(use_skill, dict):
740	                skill_name = str(use_skill.get("skill_name") or "").strip()
741	                base_index = use_skill.get("node_index")
742	                skill_reason = str(use_skill.get("reason") or "")
743	                llm_component_lib = use_skill.get("component_library")
744	                llm_target_text = use_skill.get("target_text")
745	                logger.info(
746	                    "LLM 请求调用技能 | skill=%s | base_node_index=%s | lib=%s | target_text=%s | reason=%s",
747	                    skill_name, base_index,
748	                    llm_component_lib, llm_target_text,
749	                    skill_reason[:120],
750	                )
751	                dispatch_result = self._dispatch_skill_from_llm(
752	                    skill_name=skill_name,
753	                    base_node_index=base_index if isinstance(base_index, int) else None,
754	                    semantic_dom=semantic_dom,
755	                    intent=intent,
756	                    action_type=action_type,
757	                    action_value=action_value,
758	                    component_library=str(llm_component_lib) if llm_component_lib else None,
759	                    target_text=str(llm_target_text) if llm_target_text else None,
760	                )
761	                final_idx = dispatch_result.get("node_index")
762	                rec_sel = dispatch_result.get("recommended_selector")
763	                if final_idx is not None and isinstance(final_idx, int):
764	                    # 确保 skill 返回的索引在合法范围内
765	                    if final_idx < 0 or final_idx >= len(semantic_dom):
766	                        logger.warning(
767	                            "skill %s 返回 node_index=%s 超出范围 [0, %d)，忽略",
768	                            skill_name, final_idx, len(semantic_dom),
769	                        )
770	                        final_idx = None
771	                    else:
772	                        ret = {
773	                            "node_index": final_idx,
774	                            "reason": f"[skill:{skill_name}] {skill_reason}",
775	                            "confidence": 0.85,
776	                        }
777	                        if rec_sel:
778	                            ret["recommended_selector"] = rec_sel
779	                        if dispatch_result.get("component_library"):
780	                            ret["component_library"] = dispatch_result["component_library"]
781	                        # 2A 仅精炼节点索引时，仍可自动走 2B（如 el-select 触发器按 SKILL 结构生成 XPath）
782	                        if action_type == "click" and not ret.get("recommended_selector"):
783	                            auto_skill = self._try_auto_skill_selector(
784	                                semantic_dom=semantic_dom,
785	                                intent=intent,
786	                                action_type=action_type,
787	                                node_index=final_idx,
788	                            )
789	                            if auto_skill and auto_skill.get("recommended_selector"):
790	                                ret["recommended_selector"] = auto_skill["recommended_selector"]
791	                                ret["component_library"] = auto_skill.get("component_library")
792	                        return ret
793	                logger.warning("技能 %s 未返回有效结果，回退到格式一解析", skill_name)
794	
795	            # ── 格式一：直接返回 node_index ──
796	            node_index = result.get("node_index")
797	            if node_index is None or not isinstance(node_index, int):
798	                target = result.get("target")
799	                if isinstance(target, dict):
800	                    node_index = target.get("node_index")
801	                    if isinstance(node_index, int):
802	                        result["node_index"] = node_index
803	                        result["reason"] = target.get("reason", result.get("reason"))
804	                        result["confidence"] = target.get("confidence", result.get("confidence"))
805	
806	            # 第一轮 LLM 是否给出了「可直接用于原始 semantic_dom」的有效索引（未因无效而走兜底）
807	            first_llm_gave_valid_index = True
808	
809	            node_index = result.get("node_index")
810	            if node_index is None or not isinstance(node_index, int):
811	                logger.info("LLM 未返回有效的 node_index，尝试从语义 DOM 中查找")
812	                first_llm_gave_valid_index = False
813	                result = self._fallback_resolve(annotated_filtered_dom, intent, action_type)
814	            
815	            node_index = result.get("node_index")
816	            if node_index is not None:
817	                if node_index < 0 or node_index >= len(semantic_dom):
818	                    if 0 <= node_index < len(annotated_filtered_dom):
819	                        original_index = annotated_filtered_dom[node_index].get("original_index")
820	                        if isinstance(original_index, int):
821	                            logger.warning(
822	                                "LLM 返回的 node_index=%s 更像过滤后列表位置，自动转换为原始索引 %s",
823	                                node_index,
824	                                original_index,
825	                            )
826	                            result["node_index"] = original_index
827	                        else:
828	                            logger.warning(f"node_index {node_index} 超出原始范围 [0, {len(semantic_dom)})，使用兜底解析")
829	                            first_llm_gave_valid_index = False
830	                            result = self._fallback_resolve(annotated_filtered_dom, intent, action_type)
831	                    else:
832	                        logger.warning(f"node_index {node_index} 超出原始范围 [0, {len(semantic_dom)})，使用兜底解析")
833	                        first_llm_gave_valid_index = False
834	                        result = self._fallback_resolve(annotated_filtered_dom, intent, action_type)
835	
836	            final_index = result.get("node_index")
837	            first_confidence = result.get("confidence", 0.0)
838	
839	            # ── 二次 LLM（取消 action_type 过滤）+ 祖先爬升 ──
840	            # 触发条件：第一轮置信度过低，或第一轮 LLM 未返回有效 node_index（已走本地兜底）
841	            should_retry_llm = bool(action_type) and (
842	                first_confidence <= 0.3 or not first_llm_gave_valid_index
843	            )
844	            if feature_titles_menu_nav and first_confidence < 0.5:
845	                logger.info(
846	                    "feature_titles 菜单导航：首轮置信度 %.2f < 0.5，跳过二次 LLM且不执行点击",
847	                    first_confidence,
848	                )
849	                return {
850	                    "node_index": None,
851	                    "reason": f"菜单导航置信度过低（{first_confidence:.2f}），不执行点击",
852	                    "confidence": float(first_confidence),
853	                }
854	
855	            if should_retry_llm:
856	                if not first_llm_gave_valid_index:
857	                    logger.info(
858	                        "第一轮 LLM 未返回有效 node_index，取消 action_type 过滤，发起二次 LLM",
859	                    )
860	                else:
861	                    logger.info(
862	                        "第一轮置信度过低（%.2f），取消 action_type 过滤，发起二次 LLM",
863	                        first_confidence,
864	                    )
865	                try:
866	                    # 用完整 semantic_dom（不过滤）重新标注
867	                    unfiltered_annotated: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
868	                    for ui, elem in enumerate(semantic_dom):
869	                        enriched = dict(elem)
870	                        enriched["original_index"] = ui
871	                        unfiltered_annotated.append(enriched)
872	
873	                    retry_prompt = self._build_user_prompt(
874	                        unfiltered_annotated,
875	                        intent,
876	                        None,
877	                        action_value,
878	                        feature_titles_menu_nav=feature_titles_menu_nav,
879	                        excluded_selectors=excluded_selectors,
880	                        resolver_hint=resolver_hint,
881	                    )
882	                    retry_raw = self.llm_client.llm.chat(
883	                        prompt=retry_prompt,
884	                        system_prompt=TEXT_ANCHOR_RETRY_SYSTEM_PROMPT,
885	                    )
886	                    retry_result = self._parse_response(retry_raw)
887	                    if (
888	                        feature_titles_menu_nav
889	                        and retry_result.get("skip_navigation")
890	                    ):
891	                        logger.info(
892	                            "二次 LLM：菜单导航选择不跳转 | reason=%s",
893	                            (retry_result.get("reason") or "")[:200],
894	                        )
895	                        return {
896	                            "node_index": None,
897	                            "skip_navigation": True,
898	                            "reason": str(retry_result.get("reason") or "").strip(),
899	                            "confidence": float(retry_result.get("confidence", 1.0)),
900	                        }
901	                    retry_idx = retry_result.get("node_index")
902	                    if retry_idx is None:
903	                        target = retry_result.get("target")
904	                        if isinstance(target, dict):
905	                            retry_idx = target.get("node_index")
906	
907	                    if isinstance(retry_idx, int) and 0 <= retry_idx < len(semantic_dom):
908	                        logger.info(
909	                            "二次 LLM 返回 node_index=%d | tag=%s | text=%s",
910	                            retry_idx,
911	                            semantic_dom[retry_idx].get("tag"),
912	                            (semantic_dom[retry_idx].get("text") or "")[:40],
913	                        )
914	                        # 检查该节点是否符合 action_type，若不符合则做祖先爬升
915	                        if self._node_matches_action_type(semantic_dom[retry_idx], action_type):
916	                            final_index = retry_idx
917	                            result = {
918	                                "node_index": final_index,
919	                                "reason": f"二次LLM（无类型过滤）直接命中",
920	                                "confidence": 0.75,
921	                            }
922	                        else:
923	                            climbed = self._climb_to_matching_node(
924	                                semantic_dom, retry_idx, action_type, intent,
925	                            )
926	                            if climbed is not None:
927	                                logger.info(
928	                                    "祖先爬升命中 | from=%d -> to=%d | tag=%s",
929	                                    retry_idx, climbed, semantic_dom[climbed].get("tag"),
930	                                )
931	                                final_index = climbed
932	                                result = {
933	                                    "node_index": final_index,
934	                                    "reason": f"二次LLM + 祖先爬升（{retry_idx}->{climbed}）",
935	                                    "confidence": 0.70,
936	                                }
937	                            else:
938	                                logger.debug("祖先爬升未找到匹配 action_type=%s 的节点", action_type)
939	                    else:
940	                        logger.debug("二次 LLM 未返回有效 node_index: %s", retry_idx)
941	                except Exception as e:
942	                    logger.warning("二次 LLM 重试失败: %s", e)
943	
944	            # ── 格式一也尝试自动走 skill 路径 ──
945	            ret = {
946	                "node_index": final_index,
947	                "reason": result.get("reason", "未提供原因"),
948	                "confidence": result.get("confidence", 0.0),
949	            }
950	            if feature_titles_menu_nav and isinstance(final_index, int):
951	                target_menu = ElementResolver._extract_feature_menu_target_from_intent(intent)
952	                selected = semantic_dom[final_index]
953	                if target_menu and not self._menu_node_matches_target(selected, target_menu):
954	                    logger.warning(
955	                        "feature_titles 菜单导航命中元素与目标不一致，拒绝点击 | target=%s | node_index=%d | tag=%s | text=%s",
956	                        target_menu,
957	                        final_index,
958	                        selected.get("tag"),
959	                        (selected.get("text") or "")[:40],
960	                    )
961	                    return {
962	                        "node_index": None,
963	                        "reason": f"菜单导航命中元素与目标不一致（target={target_menu}）",
964	                        "confidence": 0.0,
965	                    }
966	            if final_index is not None and isinstance(final_index, int):
967	                auto_skill = self._try_auto_skill_selector(
968	                    semantic_dom=semantic_dom,
969	                    intent=intent,
970	                    action_type=action_type,
971	                    node_index=final_index,
972	                )
973	                if auto_skill:
974	                    ret["recommended_selector"] = auto_skill["recommended_selector"]
975	                    ret["component_library"] = auto_skill["component_library"]
976	            return ret
977	
978	        except Exception as e:
979	            logger.error("元素决策解析失败: %s", e, exc_info=True)
980	            return self._fallback_resolve(annotated_filtered_dom, intent, action_type)
981	    
982	    def _filter_by_action_type(
983	        self,
984	        semantic_dom: List[Dict[str, Any]],
985	        action_type: Optional[str],
986	    ) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
987	        """
988	        根据 action_type 过滤候选元素
989	        
990	        Args:
991	            semantic_dom: 语义 DOM 元素列表
992	            action_type: 动作类型（fill、click、assert_text 等）
993	        
994	        Returns:
995	            过滤后的元素列表
996	        """
997	        if not action_type:
998	            return semantic_dom
999	        
1000	        action_type_lower = action_type.lower()
1001	        filtered = []
1002	        for element in semantic_dom:
1003	            tag = element.get("tag", "").lower()
1004	            role = element.get("role", "").lower() if element.get("role") else ""
1005	            
1006	            if action_type_lower == "fill":
1007	                # fill 操作：只允许可编辑的可输入元素（排除 readonly 等）
1008	                if tag in ("input", "textarea"):
1009	                    input_type = (element.get("type") or "text").lower()
1010	                    if tag == "input" and input_type in (
1011	                        "button", "submit", "reset", "checkbox", "radio", "file", "image", "hidden"
1012	                    ):
1013	                        continue
1014	                    # 排除只读 input（如下拉框的触发输入 el-select__input），无法 fill
1015	                    if tag == "input" and element.get("readOnly"):
1016	                        continue
1017	                    filtered.append(element)
1018	                elif role == "textbox" or element.get("contenteditable"):
1019	                    filtered.append(element)
1020	            
1021	            elif action_type_lower == "click":
1022	                # click 操作：允许可点击元素（不直接选择 input，避免点到隐藏/不可见的原始控件）
1023	                if tag in ("button", "a"):
1024	                    filtered.append(element)
1025	                elif role in ("button", "link", "menuitem", "tab"):
1026	                    filtered.append(element)
1027	                elif tag == "input":
1028	                    input_type = (element.get("type") or "").lower()
1029	                    # 复选框/单选框需要能被点击选中
1030	                    if input_type in ("checkbox", "radio"):
1031	                        filtered.append(element)
1032	                    # 其他 input（text/file/hidden 等）由 label/容器区域触发，跳过
1033	                    else:
1034	                        continue
1035	                else:
1036	                    # 也允许其他元素（可能通过 JS 处理点击），如可点击的 div/span 等
1037	                    filtered.append(element)
1038	            
1039	            elif action_type_lower == "upload":
1040	                # upload 操作：只允许文件输入框
1041	                if tag == "input":
1042	                    input_type = element.get("type", "").lower()
1043	                    # 方法1：直接检查 type="file"
1044	                    if input_type == "file":
1045	                        filtered.append(element)
1046	                    # 方法2：Element UI 等框架可能没有提取 type 属性，但可以通过其他特征识别
1047	                    # 检查：name="file" 且 class 包含 "upload" 关键词
1048	                    elif element.get("name") == "file":
1049	                        class_name = element.get("class", "")
1050	                        if isinstance(class_name, str) and any(keyword in class_name.lower() for keyword in ["upload", "el-upload"]):
1051	                            filtered.append(element)
1052	                # 注意：不允许 button、a 等其他元素，upload 必须定位到 input[type="file"] 或 input[name="file"]
1053	            
1054	            elif action_type_lower in ("check", "uncheck", "toggle"):
1055	                # check/uncheck/toggle：只允许 checkbox/radio 或角色为 switch/checkbox 的元素
1056	                if tag == "input":
1057	                    input_type = (element.get("type") or "").lower()
1058	                    if input_type in ("checkbox", "radio"):
1059	                        filtered.append(element)
1060	                elif role in ("checkbox", "switch"):
1061	                    filtered.append(element)
1062	
1063	            elif action_type_lower == "assert_table":
1064	                # assert_table：允许原生 table、表头 th，或表格容器 div（el-table、ant-table 等）
1065	                if tag == "table":
1066	                    filtered.append(element)
1067	                elif tag == "th":
1068	                    filtered.append(element)
1069	                elif tag == "div":
1070	                    class_name = element.get("class") or ""
1071	                    if isinstance(class_name, str):
1072	                        cn = class_name.lower()
1073	                        if any(kw in cn for kw in ("el-table", "ant-table", "table")):
1074	                            filtered.append(element)
1075	
1076	            else:
1077	                # 其他操作（assert_text、assert_count 等）：允许所有元素
1078	                filtered.append(element)
1079	        return filtered
1080	    
1081	    def _build_user_prompt(
1082	        self,
1083	        semantic_dom: List[Dict[str, Any]],
1084	        intent: str,
1085	        action_type: Optional[str] = None,
1086	        action_value: Optional[str] = None,
1087	        *,
1088	        feature_titles_menu_nav: bool = False,
1089	        excluded_selectors: Optional[List[str]] = None,
1090	        resolver_hint: Optional[str] = None,
1091	    ) -> str:
1092	        """
1093	        构建 USER PROMPT
1094	        
1095	        Args:
1096	            semantic_dom: 语义 DOM 元素列表（已过滤，且每个元素包含 original_index）
1097	            intent: 动作意图
1098	            action_type: 动作类型
1099	            action_value: 动作的值（如 assert_text 的期望文本）
1100	        
1101	        Returns:
1102	            USER PROMPT 字符串
1103	        """
1104	        filtered_label = "已根据 action_type 过滤" if action_type else "未过滤（完整候选列表）"
1105	        parts = []
1106	        parts.append(f"当前页面可操作元素列表（{filtered_label}）：")
1107	        
1108	        # 格式化元素列表
1109	        for idx, element in enumerate(semantic_dom, start=1):
1110	            element_desc = self._format_element(element)
1111	            original_index = element.get("original_index")
1112	            parts.append(f"{idx}. [node_index={original_index}] {element_desc}")
1113	        
1114	        parts.append("")
1115	        parts.append(f"动作类型（action_type）：{action_type or '未指定'}")
1116	        parts.append(f"用户操作意图：{intent}")
1117	        parts.append("【强约束】选择 node_index 时必须核对元素属性语义（text/placeholder/name/aria-label/role/id/type/class）与 intent 的一致性。")
1118	
1119	        if resolver_hint:
1120	            parts.append("")
1121	            parts.append(
1122	                "【重试策略提示】上一步执行后页面校验未通过，策略模型给出如下线索（若与意图冲突以意图为准，但请认真参考）："
1123	            )
1124	            parts.append(str(resolver_hint).strip()[:800])
1125	
1126	        if excluded_selectors:
1127	            parts.append("")
1128	            parts.append(
1129	                "【重要】下列选择器表示**上一轮流已经尝试过的元素**（执行后页面校验未通过），"
1130	                "请**不要**再选择会命中相同/等价目标的节点；请从列表中选择**不同**的 node_index："
1131	            )
1132	            for es in excluded_selectors[:16]:
1133	                es_s = str(es).strip()
1134	                if es_s:
1135	                    parts.append(f"  - {es_s[:500]}")
1136	
1137	        if feature_titles_menu_nav:
1138	            parts.append("")
1139	            parts.append("**【本步为侧栏/顶栏模块导航】** 请在「点击菜单进入目标模块」与「不跳转」之间二选一：")
1140	            parts.append("1. 若当前页面**已是**意图中的目标模块（例如面包屑、页面标题、侧栏高亮已表明无需再点），或侧栏/顶栏**没有**与意图匹配的安全可点入口，可输出 **格式三**，**不要**强行选择 node_index：")
1141	            parts.append('   {"skip_navigation": true, "reason": "一句话说明为何不点击（中文）"}')
1142	            parts.append("2. 若需要点击菜单项进入目标模块，请使用下方的格式一或格式二，返回有效的 node_index。")
1143	        
1144	        # 对于 click 操作，强调文本内容匹配的重要性
1145	        if action_type == "click":
1146	            # 尝试从 intent 中提取按钮文本关键词
1147	            button_keywords = ["搜索", "提交", "确认", "取消", "重置", "保存", "删除", "编辑", "添加", "上传", "下载"]
1148	            matched_keywords = [kw for kw in button_keywords if kw in intent]
1149	            if matched_keywords:
1150	                parts.append("")
1151	                parts.append(f"**重要提示**：intent 中提到了按钮关键词：{', '.join(matched_keywords)}")
1152	                parts.append("请选择文本内容与这些关键词完全匹配的元素。")
1153	                parts.append("**文本匹配规则**：")
1154	                parts.append("1. 如果 intent 是'点击删除按钮'，必须选择 text='删除' 的按钮，而不是 text='删除当前版本' 或其他包含'删除'的文本。")
1155	                parts.append("2. 如果 intent 是'点击搜索按钮'，必须选择 text='搜索' 的按钮，而不是 text='高级搜索' 或其他包含'搜索'的文本。")
1156	                parts.append("3. 文本必须完全匹配关键词，不能是包含关键词的长文本。")
1157	                parts.append("4. 优先选择 BUTTON 标签的元素，而不是菜单项（LI/MENUITEM）或其他元素。")
1158	            
1159	            # 检查是否涉及弹窗/对话框
1160	            dialog_keywords = ["弹窗", "对话框", "dialog", "modal", "popup", "确认框", "提示框", "操作弹窗"]
1161	            if any(kw in intent for kw in dialog_keywords):
1162	                parts.append("")
1163	                parts.append("**关键提示**：intent 提到了弹窗/对话框中的元素。")
1164	                parts.append("1. **必须优先选择标记为[在弹窗中]的元素**，不要选择弹窗外的元素。")
1165	                parts.append("2. **文本精确匹配优先**：如果 intent 提到'上传按钮'，优先选择 text='上传' 的元素，而不是 text='上传新版本' 或其他包含'上传'的长文本。")
1166	                parts.append("3. **允许非 button 标签**：弹窗内的可点击元素可能不是 button 标签（可能是 em、span、a 等），只要文本匹配且在弹窗内，也要选择。")
1167	                parts.append("4. **label 关联优先**：如果 intent 提到'上传文档'相关，优先选择在 label='上传文档' 表单项内的元素。")
1168	                parts.append("**示例**：intent 是'点击上传弹窗中的上传按钮'：")
1169	                parts.append("  - ✅ 正确：选择 text='上传' 且在弹窗内的元素（即使不是 button 标签）")
1170	                parts.append("  - ❌ 错误：选择 text='上传新版本' 但位于弹窗外的 button 元素")
1171	            
1172	        # 对于 upload 操作，明确说明必须选择文件输入框
1173	        if action_type == "upload":
1174	            parts.append("")
1175	            parts.append("**关键提示**：upload 操作必须选择文件输入框（input[type='file']）。")
1176	            parts.append("1. **只允许选择 input[type='file'] 元素**，不要选择触发文件选择的按钮（button）或其他元素。")
1177	            parts.append("2. 即使按钮能打开文件选择对话框，upload 动作也必须直接定位到文件输入框本身。")
1178	            parts.append("3. 系统会通过 Playwright 的 setInputFiles 方法直接上传文件到 input[type='file']，不需要点击按钮。")
1179	            parts.append("4. 如果 intent 提到'上传文件'、'选择文件'等，必须选择 input[type='file'] 元素。")
1180	            parts.append("**示例**：intent 是'上传附件'或'选择文件'：")
1181	            parts.append("  - ✅ 正确：选择 input[type='file'] 元素（即使它在弹窗内或隐藏）")
1182	            parts.append("  - ❌ 错误：选择 button、span、em 等触发文件选择的元素")
1183	        
1184	        # 对于 fill 操作，强调步骤描述上下文 + placeholder/label 匹配
1185	        if action_type == "fill":
1186	            parts.append("**fill 提示**：多输入框时按 intent 区分表单内 vs 搜索栏，优先 [在弹窗中]。")
1187	        
1188	        # 对于 assert_text，提供期望的文本内容，帮助更准确地选择元素
1189	        if action_type == "assert_text" and action_value:
1190	            parts.append(f"期望的文本内容：{action_value}")
1191	            parts.append("")
1192	            parts.append("重要提示：请选择文本内容与期望文本内容最匹配的元素。")
1193	            parts.append("如果期望文本是具体的文件名等，请选择包含该完整文本或主要部分的元素。")
1194	        
1195	        parts.append("")
1196	        parts.append("请从上述元素列表中选择最匹配的元素，输出 JSON（格式一或格式二）：")
1197	        parts.append("格式一（直接返回）：")
1198	        parts.append('{"target": {"node_index": 0, "reason": "...", "confidence": 0.9}}')
1199	        parts.append("格式二A（节点选择技能）：")
1200	        parts.append('{"use_skill": {"skill_name": "choose_best_click_target", "node_index": 0, "reason": "..."}}')
1201	        parts.append("格式二B（selector 构建技能，提供组件库和目标文本）：")
1202	        parts.append('{"use_skill": {"skill_name": "build_el_select_trigger_selector", "node_index": 0, "component_library": "element-ui", "target_text": "分类标签", "reason": "el-select 展开触发器，需定位 wrapper/combobox"}}')
1203	        parts.append('{"use_skill": {"skill_name": "build_tree_checkbox_selector", "node_index": 0, "component_library": "ant-design", "target_text": "菜单根", "reason": "class 含 ant- 前缀"}}')
1204	        parts.append("")
1205	        parts.append("**重要**：必须返回每个元素前显示的 `[node_index=xxx]` 中的数字，不要返回列表序号 1/2/3。")
1206	        valid_indices = [str(e.get("original_index")) for e in semantic_dom if isinstance(e.get("original_index"), int)]
1207	        parts.append(f"当前可选的有效 node_index 有：{', '.join(valid_indices[:80])}")
1208	        parts.append("如果列表序号是 1. 2. 3.，而元素前显示的是 [node_index=17]，则必须返回 17。")
1209	        parts.append("无论如何必须返回一个最符合要求的索引（格式一）或请求一个技能（格式二）")
1210	        
1211	        return "\n".join(parts)
1212	    
1213	    def _format_element(self, element: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
1214	        """
1215	        格式化单个元素为可读字符串
1216	        
1217	        Args:
1218	            element: 元素信息字典
1219	        
1220	        Returns:
1221	            格式化后的字符串，例如：'Button | text="提交" | testId="user-submit-btn"'
1222	        """
1223	        tag = element.get("tag", "unknown").upper()
1224	        text = element.get("text", "").strip()
1225	        test_id = element.get("testId")
1226	        role = element.get("role")
1227	        aria = element.get("aria")
1228	        placeholder = element.get("placeholder")
1229	        name = element.get("name")
1230	        node_id = element.get("id")
1231	        node_type = element.get("type")
1232	        title = element.get("title")
1233	        z_index = element.get("zIndex")
1234	        class_name = element.get("class", "")
1235	        
1236	        parts = [tag]
1237	        
1238	        if text:
1239	            # 截断过长的文本
1240	            display_text = text if len(text) <= 50 else text[:50] + "..."
1241	            parts.append(f'text="{display_text}"')
1242	        
1243	        if test_id:
1244	            parts.append(f'testId="{test_id}"')
1245	        
1246	        # 对于 input/textarea 元素，placeholder 是非常重要的语义信息
1247	        if placeholder:
1248	            parts.append(f'placeholder="{placeholder}"')
1249	        
1250	        # name 属性也很有用
1251	        if name:
1252	            parts.append(f'name="{name}"')
1253	        if node_id:
1254	            parts.append(f'id="{node_id}"')
1255	        if node_type:
1256	            parts.append(f'type="{node_type}"')
1257	        if title:
1258	            parts.append(f'title="{title}"')
1259	        
1260	        if role:
1261	            parts.append(f'role="{role}"')
1262	        
1263	        if aria:
1264	            aria_label = aria.get("aria-label")
1265	            if aria_label:
1266	                parts.append(f'aria-label="{aria_label}"')
1267	            aria_desc = aria.get("aria-describedby")
1268	            if aria_desc:
1269	                parts.append(f'aria-describedby="{aria_desc}"')
1270	
1271	        # z-index（用于区分前后层级）
1272	        if z_index:
1273	            parts.append(f'z-index="{z_index}"')
1274	        if isinstance(class_name, str) and class_name.strip():
1275	            # 仅保留前几个 class token，避免 prompt 过长
1276	            class_tokens = [t for t in class_name.split() if t][:4]
1277	            if class_tokens:
1278	                parts.append(f'class~="{ " ".join(class_tokens) }"')
1279	        
1280	        # 检查是否在弹窗/对话框中（semantic_dom 抽取时已检测祖先、或通过 class/role/xpath 判断）
1281	        in_dialog = bool(element.get("in_dialog"))
1282	        
1283	        if not in_dialog and isinstance(class_name, str):
1284	            if any(keyword in class_name.lower() for keyword in ["dialog", "modal", "overlay", "message-box", "drawer"]):
1285	                parts.append("[在弹窗中]")
1286	                in_dialog = True
1287	            elif role == "dialog":
1288	                parts.append("[在弹窗中]")
1289	                in_dialog = True
1290	        
1291	        xpath = element.get("xpath_candidate", "")
1292	        if not in_dialog and xpath:
1293	            xpath_lower = xpath.lower()
1294	            if any(keyword in xpath_lower for keyword in ["dialog", "modal", "overlay", "drawer"]):
1295	                parts.append("[在弹窗中]")
1296	                in_dialog = True
1297	        
1298	        # 标记：如果是文本元素但在弹窗内，可能是可点击的
1299	        if in_dialog and tag in ("em", "span", "p") and not role and tag != "button":
1300	            parts.append("[可点击文本]")
1301	        
1302	        return " | ".join(parts)
1303	    
1304	    def _parse_response(self, raw_response: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
1305	        """
1306	        解析 LLM 响应
1307	        
1308	        Args:
1309	            raw_response: LLM 原始响应
1310	        
1311	        Returns:
1312	            解析后的结果字典
1313	        """
1314	        try:
1315	            parsed = self.llm_client._extract_json(raw_response)
1316	
1317	            # 格式三：菜单导航 — 显式不跳转（与 feature_titles_menu_nav 配套）
1318	            if parsed.get("skip_navigation") is True:
1319	                return {
1320	                    "skip_navigation": True,
1321	                    "reason": parsed.get("reason"),
1322	                    "node_index": None,
1323	                    "confidence": float(parsed.get("confidence", 1.0)),
1324	                }
1325	            _tgt0 = parsed.get("target")
1326	            if isinstance(_tgt0, dict) and _tgt0.get("skip_navigation") is True:
1327	                return {
1328	                    "skip_navigation": True,
1329	                    "reason": _tgt0.get("reason") or parsed.get("reason"),
1330	                    "node_index": None,
1331	                    "confidence": float(_tgt0.get("confidence", parsed.get("confidence", 1.0))),
1332	                }
1333	
1334	            # 格式二：use_skill
1335	            if "use_skill" in parsed and isinstance(parsed.get("use_skill"), dict):
1336	                return {"use_skill": parsed["use_skill"]}
1337	
1338	            # 格式一：target
1339	            target = parsed.get("target", {})
1340	            
1341	            return {
1342	                "node_index": target.get("node_index"),
1343	                "reason": target.get("reason"),
1344	                "confidence": target.get("confidence", 0.0)
1345	            }
1346	            
1347	        except (json.JSONDecodeError, KeyError, ValueError) as e:
1348	            logger.warning("解析 LLM 响应失败: %s，原始响应: %s", e, raw_response[:200])
1349	            return {"node_index": None, "reason": None, "confidence": 0.0}
1350	    
1351	    def _node_matches_action_type(self, node: Dict[str, Any], action_type: Optional[str]) -> bool:
1352	        """判断节点是否符合 action_type 要求的元素类型"""
1353	        if not action_type:
1354	            return True
1355	        tag = (node.get("tag") or "").lower()
1356	        role = (node.get("role") or "").lower()
1357	        at = action_type.lower()
1358	        if at == "fill":
1359	            if tag in ("input", "textarea"):
1360	                input_type = (node.get("type") or "text").lower()
1361	                if input_type in ("button", "submit", "reset", "checkbox", "radio", "file", "image", "hidden"):
1362	                    return False
1363	                if node.get("readOnly"):
1364	                    return False
1365	                return True
1366	            return role == "textbox" or bool(node.get("contenteditable"))
1367	        if at == "click":
1368	            return tag in ("button", "a", "li", "div", "span", "em", "label") or role in (
1369	                "button", "link", "menuitem", "tab", "option", "treeitem", "checkbox",
1370	            )
1371	        return True
1372	
1373	    def _fill_field_match_score(self, fill_field: str, placeholder: str, aria_label: str) -> float:
1374	        """字段名与 placeholder/aria 的匹配分（支持整词与半词，适配中文）。"""
1375	        fl = (fill_field or "").strip().lower()
1376	        if not fl:
1377	            return 0.0
1378	        ph = (placeholder or "").lower()
1379	        al = (aria_label or "").lower()
1380	        s = 0.0
1381	        if fl in ph:
1382	            s += 5.0
1383	        if fl in al:
1384	            s += 3.0
1385	        if len(fl) >= 4:
1386	            half = len(fl) // 2
1387	            a, b = fl[:half], fl[half:]
1388	            if len(a) >= 2 and a in ph:
1389	                s += 2.0
1390	            if len(b) >= 2 and b in ph:
1391	                s += 2.0
1392	            if len(a) >= 2 and a in al:
1393	                s += 1.5
1394	            if len(b) >= 2 and b in al:
1395	                s += 1.5
1396	        return s
1397	
1398	    def _climb_to_matching_node(
1399	        self,
1400	        semantic_dom: List[Dict[str, Any]],
1401	        anchor_idx: int,
1402	        action_type: str,
1403	        intent: str,
1404	    ) -> Optional[int]:
1405	        """
1406	        从 anchor_idx 出发，在 semantic_dom 中寻找附近（xpath 前缀相近）的匹配 action_type 的节点。
1407	        用于"二次 LLM 选中文本标签但需要填写输入框"等场景。
1408	        """
1409	        import re
1410	        anchor = semantic_dom[anchor_idx]
1411	        anchor_xpath = anchor.get("xpath_candidate") or anchor.get("xpath") or ""
1412	
1413	        # 提取 intent 中的字段名
1414	        fill_field = None
1415	        if action_type.lower() == "fill":
1416	            for pattern in [
1417	                r"在\s*[\"']?(.+?)[\"']?\s*输入框中(?:填写|输入)",
1418	                r"在\s*[\"']?(.+?)[\"']?\s*输入框",
1419	                r"在\s*[\"']?(.+?)[\"']?\s*(?:填写|输入)",
1420	            ]:
1421	                m = re.search(pattern, intent)
1422	                if m:
1423	                    lbl = (m.group(1) or "").strip().strip('"\'')
1424	                    if "的" in lbl:
1425	                        lbl = lbl.split("的")[-1].strip()
1426	                    lbl = re.sub(r"(输入框|输入栏|文本框|字段)$", "", lbl).strip()
1427	                    if lbl:
1428	                        fill_field = lbl
1429	                        break
1430	
1431	        def _z_to_float(z: Any) -> Optional[float]:
1432	            if z is None:
1433	                return None
1434	            try:
1435	                v = float(str(z).strip())
1436	                return v if v == v else None  # NaN
1437	            except (TypeError, ValueError):
1438	                return None
1439	
1440	        anchor_z = _z_to_float(anchor.get("zIndex"))
1441	        anchor_in_dialog = bool(anchor.get("in_dialog"))
1442	
1443	        best_idx = None
1444	        best_score = -1.0
1445	        search_range = max(30, len(semantic_dom) // 4)
1446	
1447	        start = max(0, anchor_idx - search_range)
1448	        end = min(len(semantic_dom), anchor_idx + search_range + 1)
1449	
1450	        for i in range(start, end):
1451	            if i == anchor_idx:
1452	                continue
1453	            node = semantic_dom[i]
1454	            if not self._node_matches_action_type(node, action_type):
1455	                continue
1456	            score = 0.0
1457	            node_xpath = node.get("xpath_candidate") or node.get("xpath") or ""
1458	            # xpath 段级别前缀匹配：按 '/' 分段，比较各段是否相同
1459	            if anchor_xpath and node_xpath:
1460	                a_segs = [s for s in anchor_xpath.split("/") if s]
1461	                n_segs = [s for s in node_xpath.split("/") if s]
1462	                common_len = 0
1463	                for a, b in zip(a_segs, n_segs):
1464	                    if a == b:
1465	                        common_len += 1
1466	                    else:
1467	                        break
1468	                score += common_len * 1.0
1469	
1470	            # placeholder / aria-label 与字段名匹配
1471	            placeholder = (node.get("placeholder") or "").lower()
1472	            aria = node.get("aria") or {}
1473	            aria_label = (aria.get("aria-label") or "").lower() if isinstance(aria, dict) else ""
1474	            field_score = 0.0
1475	            if fill_field:
1476	                field_score = self._fill_field_match_score(fill_field, placeholder, aria_label)
1477	                score += field_score
1478	
1479	            # 弹窗内优先（与 intent「弹窗」一致时）
1480	            if "弹窗" in intent or "对话框" in intent:
1481	                if node.get("in_dialog"):
1482	                    score += 4.0
1483	                if anchor_in_dialog and node.get("in_dialog"):
1484	                    score += 2.0
1485	                nx = (node_xpath or "").lower()
1486	                if "dialog" in nx or "overlay" in nx or "drawer" in nx:
1487	                    score += 1.5
1488	
1489	            # z-index 与锚点接近（同层叠上下文）
1490	            nz = _z_to_float(node.get("zIndex"))
1491	            if anchor_z is not None and nz is not None and abs(anchor_z - nz) < 50:
1492	                score += 1.0
1493	
1494	            # 距离惩罚
1495	            distance = abs(i - anchor_idx)
1496	            score -= distance * 0.05
1497	
1498	            if score > best_score:
1499	                best_score = score
1500	                best_idx = i
1501	
1502	        # 有明确字段名时，禁止仅靠「邻近 / 弹窗」选中：placeholder 或 aria 须与字段名有部分以上重合
1503	        if fill_field and best_idx is not None:
1504	            bn = semantic_dom[best_idx]
1505	            ph = (bn.get("placeholder") or "").lower()
1506	            aria = bn.get("aria") or {}
1507	            al = (aria.get("aria-label") or "").lower() if isinstance(aria, dict) else ""

1509	            if fs < 0.3:
1510	                best_idx = None

1512	                    "fill_field 安全检查：最佳候选 placeholder/aria 与字段名不匹配，丢弃 | fill_field=%s | fs=%.2f",
1513	                    fill_field[:60], fs,
1514	                )
1515	
1516	        if best_idx is not None and best_score > 0:
1517	            return best_idx

1520	    def _fallback_resolve(
1521	        self,
1522	        semantic_dom: List[Dict[str, Any]],
1523	        intent: str,
1524	        action_type: Optional[str] = None,
1525	    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
1526	        """
1527	        兜底解析：当 LLM 解析失败时，使用简单的文本匹配 + 结构启发
1528	
1529	        Args:
1530	            semantic_dom: 语义 DOM 元素列表（已过滤，且优先包含 original_index）
1531	            intent: 动作意图
1532	            action_type: 动作类型
1533	
1534	        Returns:
1535	            包含 node_index, reason, confidence 的字典
1536	        """
1537	        # 检查是否是下拉框/下拉菜单场景
1538	        dropdown_keywords = ["下拉框", "下拉菜单", "dropdown", "下拉", "菜单"]
1539	        is_dropdown_scenario = any(kw in intent for kw in dropdown_keywords)
1540	
1541	        # 区分「展开/点击下拉框触发器」和「点击下拉选项」
1542	        # 前者需要找 input/combobox（触发器），后者找 li/menuitem（选项）
1543	        expand_trigger_keywords = ["展开按钮", "展开下拉", "下拉框展开", "下拉菜单展开"]
1544	        option_keywords = ["下拉选项", "选项"]
1545	        is_dropdown_trigger_scenario = is_dropdown_scenario and any(kw in intent for kw in expand_trigger_keywords)
1546	        is_dropdown_option_scenario = is_dropdown_scenario and any(kw in intent for kw in option_keywords) and not is_dropdown_trigger_scenario
1547	
1548	        # 从 intent 提取字段名（如 "点击文档分类下拉框展开按钮" → "文档分类"）
1549	        import re
1550	        dropdown_field_label = None
1551	        if is_dropdown_scenario:
1552	            for pattern in [
1553	                r"点击\s*[\"']?(.+?)[\"']?\s*下拉(?:框|菜单|栏)",
1554	                r"展开\s*[\"']?(.+?)[\"']?\s*下拉(?:框|菜单|栏)",
1555	            ]:
1556	                m = re.search(pattern, intent)
1557	                if m:
1558	                    lbl = (m.group(1) or "").strip().strip('"\'')
1559	                    if 1 <= len(lbl) <= 30:
1560	                        dropdown_field_label = lbl
1561	                        break
1562	
1563	        # fill 场景：提取“XX输入框中填写”的字段名，优先匹配 placeholder/aria-label
1564	        fill_field_label = None
1565	        is_fill_action = (action_type or "").lower() == "fill"
1566	        if is_fill_action:
1567	            for pattern in [
1568	                r"在\s*[\"']?(.+?)[\"']?\s*输入框中(?:填写|输入)",
1569	                r"在\s*[\"']?(.+?)[\"']?\s*(?:填写|输入)",
1570	                r"向\s*[\"']?(.+?)[\"']?\s*输入框",
1571	            ]:
1572	                m = re.search(pattern, intent)
1573	                if m:
1574	                    lbl = (m.group(1) or "").strip().strip('"\'')
1575	                    # 常见写法：在XX页面的YY输入框中填写 -> 取最后一个“的”后的字段名 YY
1576	                    if "的" in lbl:
1577	                        lbl = lbl.split("的")[-1].strip()
1578	                    # 再去掉可能残留的描述词尾
1579	                    lbl = re.sub(r"(输入框|输入栏|文本框|字段)$", "", lbl).strip()
1580	                    if 1 <= len(lbl) <= 40:
1581	                        fill_field_label = lbl
1582	                        break
1583	        if is_fill_action:
1584	            logger.debug("fallback fill 字段提取 | intent=%s | field_label=%s", intent, fill_field_label)
1585	
1586	        # 简单的文本匹配逻辑
1587	        intent_lower = intent.lower()
1588	        # click 文本锚点（如：点击 add-flow 字样 / 点击“xxx” / 点击xxx名称）
1589	        click_text_anchor = None
1590	        if (action_type or "").lower() == "click":
1591	            import re
1592	            for pat in (
1593	                r"点击\s*[\"'“”‘’「」]?\s*([^\"'“”‘’「」\s]{2,80}?)\s*[\"'“”‘’「」]?\s*(?:字样|文本|名称|按钮|链接)?(?:\s|$)",
1594	            ):
1595	                m = re.search(pat, intent)
1596	                if m:
1597	                    cand = (m.group(1) or "").strip().strip('"\'“”‘’「」')
1598	                    # 去掉常见尾词，保留真正关键词
1599	                    cand = re.sub(r"(字样|文本|名称|按钮|链接)$", "", cand).strip()
1600	                    if 2 <= len(cand) <= 80:
1601	                        click_text_anchor = cand
1602	                        break
1603	
1604	        # 如果已提取到 click 文本锚点，先做强匹配（优先 text，其次 name/aria/testId）
1605	        if click_text_anchor:
1606	            anchor_lower = click_text_anchor.lower()
1607	            for idx, element in enumerate(semantic_dom):
1608	                text = (element.get("text") or "").strip().lower()
1609	                name = (element.get("name") or "").strip().lower()
1610	                test_id = (element.get("testId") or "").strip().lower()
1611	                aria = element.get("aria") or {}
1612	                aria_label = (aria.get("aria-label") or "").strip().lower() if isinstance(aria, dict) else ""
1613	                if (
1614	                    text == anchor_lower
1615	                    or anchor_lower in text
1616	                    or name == anchor_lower
1617	                    or anchor_lower in name
1618	                    or test_id == anchor_lower
1619	                    or anchor_lower in test_id
1620	                    or aria_label == anchor_lower
1621	                    or anchor_lower in aria_label
1622	                ):
1623	                    return {
1624	                        "node_index": semantic_dom[idx].get("original_index", idx),
1625	                        "reason": f"兜底文本锚点命中（{click_text_anchor}）",
1626	                        "confidence": 0.8,
1627	                    }
1628	
1629	        # 尝试提取意图中引号包裹的按钮文本作为关键词
1630	        button_text_keywords = []
1631	        quoted_match = re.findall(r"[「'\"']([^'\"」「」]+)['\"'」]", intent)
1632	        for qm in quoted_match:
1633	            if 2 <= len(qm) <= 200:
1634	                button_text_keywords.append(qm)
1635	
1636	        # 如果没有明确的按钮文本，使用通用关键词提取
1637	        if not button_text_keywords:
1638	            intent_keywords = [kw for kw in re.split(r"[\s,，。、]+", intent_lower) if len(kw) > 1]
1639	        else:
1640	            intent_keywords = button_text_keywords
1641	
1642	        best_match_idx = None
1643	        best_match_score = 0.0
1644	
1645	        for idx, element in enumerate(semantic_dom):
1646	            score = 0.0
1647	            tag = (element.get("tag") or "").lower()
1648	            text = (element.get("text") or "").strip()
1649	            text_lower = text.lower()
1650	            role = (element.get("role") or "").lower()
1651	            test_id = (element.get("testId") or "").lower()
1652	            placeholder = (element.get("placeholder") or "").lower()
1653	            class_name = (element.get("class") or "").lower()
1654	            aria = element.get("aria") or {}
1655	            aria_label = (aria.get("aria-label") or "").lower() if isinstance(aria, dict) else ""
1656	
1657	            # 如果是下拉框场景，优先选择 li/menuitem 元素
1658	            if is_dropdown_scenario:
1659	                if tag == "li" or role == "menuitem":
1660	                    score += 1.0  # 大幅提升下拉菜单项的分数
1661	                elif tag == "button" and not is_dropdown_scenario:
1662	                    score -= 0.5  # 降低普通按钮的分数（除非不是下拉框场景）
1663	
1664	            # fill 场景优先输入控件，并使用 placeholder 进行字段名匹配
1665	            if is_fill_action:
1666	                if tag in ("input", "textarea") or role == "textbox":
1667	                    score += 1.2
1668	                if fill_field_label:
1669	                    fill_lbl_lower = fill_field_label.lower()
1670	                    if fill_lbl_lower in placeholder:
1671	                        score += 3.0
1672	                    if fill_lbl_lower in aria_label:
1673	                        score += 1.5
1674	                    if fill_lbl_lower in text_lower:
1675	                        score += 0.4
1676	
1677	            # 计算文本匹配分数
1678	            for keyword in intent_keywords:
1679	                keyword_lower = keyword.lower()
1680	                # 精确匹配文本（完全匹配）
1681	                if text_lower == keyword_lower:
1682	                    score += 2.0  # 完全匹配权重最高
1683	                # 文本包含关键词
1684	                elif keyword_lower in text_lower:
1685	                    score += 0.5
1686	                # 其他属性匹配
1687	                if keyword_lower in test_id:
1688	                    score += 0.3
1689	                if keyword_lower in placeholder:
1690	                    score += 0.4
1691	                if keyword_lower in aria_label:
1692	                    score += 0.2
1693	                if keyword_lower in class_name:
1694	                    score += 0.4
1695	
1696	            # 英文 class 语义兜底：中文 intent 无法直接命中文案时，尝试 class 关键词
1697	            # 典型：create-button / btn-create / add-btn
1698	            is_create_intent = any(kw in intent for kw in ["创建", "新建", "新增"])
1699	            if is_create_intent:
1700	                if "create" in class_name or "new" in class_name or "add" in class_name:
1701	                    score += 1.2
1702	                if "button" in class_name or "btn" in class_name:
1703	                    score += 0.6
1704	                # click 场景优先可点击语义标签
1705	                if action_type and action_type.lower() == "click" and tag in ("button", "a"):
1706	                    score += 0.4
1707	
1708	            if score > best_match_score:
1709	                best_match_score = score
1710	                best_match_idx = idx

10	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

15	
16	def wait_dom_stable(page: Page, timeout: int = 2000, quiet_ms: int = 200) -> None:
17	    """
18	    等待页面 DOM 在短时间内无大规模变更（MutationObserver），再执行后续逻辑。
19	
20	    用于 SPA 跳转、弹窗渲染、列表刷新等场景，避免刚执行完动作就立刻抽 DOM 得到过渡态。
21	
22	    Args:
23	        page: Playwright Page
24	        timeout: ``wait_for_function`` 最长等待（毫秒）
25	        quiet_ms: 距最近一次 DOM 变更至少该毫秒数后视为稳定（下限 50ms）
26	    """
27	    quiet = max(50, int(quiet_ms))
28	    to = max(100, int(timeout))
29	    try:
30	        page.wait_for_function(
31	            f"""
32	                () => {{
33	                  const now = Date.now();
34	                  const quiet = {quiet};
35	                  if (!window.__lastDomChange) {{
36	                    window.__lastDomChange = now;
37	                    new MutationObserver(() => {{
38	                      window.__lastDomChange = Date.now();
39	                    }}).observe(document.body, {{ childList: true, subtree: true }});
40	                  }}
41	                  return now - window.__lastDomChange > quiet;
42	                }}
43	                """,
44	            timeout=to,
45	        )
46	        logger.debug("DOM 已稳定（quiet_ms=%s）", quiet)
47	    except Exception as e:
48	        logger.debug("等待 DOM 稳定超时或失败，继续执行: %s", e)
49	
50	
51	def extract(page: Page) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
52	    """
53	    从当前页面提取语义 DOM 信息（含主 frame 与所有 iframe）
54	    
55	    只提取对 UI 自动化有意义的元素：
56	    - 可交互元素（button, input, select, a, textarea 等）
57	    - 有可见文本的元素
58	    - 有 ARIA 属性的元素
59	    - 有 data-testid 的元素
60	    
61	    若主内容在 iframe 中（如微前端/portal），会从各 iframe 提取并合并，
62	    来自 iframe 的元素会带 _frame_locator 字段供后续定位。
63	    
64	    Args:
65	        page: Playwright Page 对象
66	    
67	    Returns:
68	        元素信息列表，每个元素包含（常见字段）：
69	        - tag: 元素标签名
70	        - text: 元素的可见文本（截断到 MAX_TEXT_LENGTH）
71	        - aria: ARIA 相关属性（label, labelledby, describedby 等）
72	        - role: ARIA role 属性
73	        - testId: data-testid 属性值
74	        - xpath: 元素的 XPath（用于兜底定位）
75	        - zIndex: 计算得到的 z-index（用于区分前景/遮罩/底层元素）
76	        - _frame_locator: 若元素来自 iframe，则存在，用于构建 page.frame_locator(...).locator(selector)
77	    """
78	    elements: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
79	    try:
80	        # 1. 主 frame
81	        main_elements = page.evaluate(_extract_dom_script)
82	        if main_elements:
83	            elements.extend(main_elements)
84	        
85	        # 2. 各子 frame（iframe 内主内容，如微前端 workspace 等）
86	        frames = page.frames
87	        iframe_nth = 0
88	        for frame in frames:
89	            if frame == page.main_frame:
90	                continue
91	            try:

96	                frame_locator = iframe_el.evaluate("""el => {

99	                    if (el.src) {

102	                        const part = parts.length > 0 ? parts[parts.length - 1].slice(0, 30) : null;
103	                        if (part && part.length > 1) return 'iframe[src*="' + part.replace(/\\\\/g, '\\\\\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\\\"') + '"]';
104	                    }
105	                    return null;

107	                if not frame_locator:

109	                iframe_nth += 1

112	                elements.extend(frame_elements)

114	            except Exception as e:

116	    except Exception as e:
117	        logger.error("抽取语义 DOM 失败: %s", e)
118	    return elements

144	        }

348	    
349	    // 卡片容器 div 本身不触发点击，只有内部的 title span 可点击；跳过容器，只保留 span

396	    
397	    return result;
