```text
532	        if (!el || el.nodeType !== 1) {
533	            return;
534	        }
535	        result.push(extractElementInfoAll(el));
536	        const children = el.children || [];
537	        for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
538	            walk(children[i]);
539	        }
540	        if (el.shadowRoot) {
541	            const srChildren = el.shadowRoot.children || [];
542	            for (let j = 0; j < srChildren.length; j++) {
543	                walk(srChildren[j]);
544	            }
545	        }
546	    }
547	    if (document.documentElement) {
548	        walk(document.documentElement);
549	    }
550	    return result;
551	}
552	"""
553	
554	
555	def extract_all_dom_for_post_verify(page: Page) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
556	    """
557	    供步骤后校验使用：列出当前 frame 内**每一个**元素节点（无语义筛选），含 ``html``/``head``/``script``/``style`` 等。
558	
559	    ``text`` 为**仅当前元素直接子文本节点**的拼接（截断），避免父级带上整页子树文本；表单控件另附 ``value``（截断）。
560	
561	    对 **open** 的 shadowRoot 会递归下探；跨域 iframe 仍可能无法注入脚本。
562	    """
563	    elements: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
564	    try:
565	        main_elements = page.evaluate(_extract_dom_all_elements_script)
566	        if main_elements:
567	            elements.extend(main_elements)
568	        frames = page.frames
569	        iframe_nth = 0
570	        for frame in frames:
571	            if frame == page.main_frame:
572	                continue
573	            try:
574	                frame_elements = frame.evaluate(_extract_dom_all_elements_script)
575	                if not frame_elements:
576	                    continue
577	                iframe_el = frame.frame_element()
578	                frame_locator = iframe_el.evaluate(
579	                    """el => {
580	                    if (el.id && el.id.trim()) return '#' + el.id;
581	                    if (el.name && el.name.trim()) return 'iframe[name="' + el.name.replace(/"/g, '\\\\"') + '"]';
582	                    if (el.src) {
583	                        const s = (el.src || '').split('?')[0];
584	                        const parts = s.split('/').filter(Boolean);
585	                        const part = parts.length > 0 ? parts[parts.length - 1].slice(0, 30) : null;
586	                        if (part && part.length > 1) return 'iframe[src*="' + part.replace(/\\\\/g, '\\\\\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\\\"') + '"]';
587	                    }
588	                    return null;
589	                }"""
590	                )
591	                if not frame_locator:
592	                    frame_locator = f"iframe >> nth={iframe_nth}"
593	                iframe_nth += 1
594	                for el in frame_elements:
595	                    el["_frame_locator"] = frame_locator
596	                elements.extend(frame_elements)
597	                logger.debug(
598	                    "extract_all_dom_for_post_verify: iframe 内 %d 个元素 (frame_locator=%s)",
599	                    len(frame_elements),
600	                    frame_locator,
601	                )
602	            except Exception as e:
603	                logger.debug("extract_all_dom_for_post_verify: 无法从 iframe 提取: %s", e)
604	    except Exception as e:
605	        logger.error("extract_all_dom_for_post_verify 抽取失败: %s", e)
606	    return elements

609	# 步骤后校验专用：在 isRelevantElement 基础上纳入提示/错误/状态等不可交互节点（不替换默认 extract）
610	_marker_comment = "    // 遍历 DOM 树，提取有意义的元素"
611	_marker_check = "        // 检查当前元素\n        if (isRelevantElement(element)) {"
612	_replace_check = "shouldIncludeForPostVerify(element)"
613	_pv_func = """    function shouldIncludeForPostVerify(element) {
614	        if (isRelevantElement(element)) {
615	            return true;
616	        }
617	        const skipPv = ['SCRIPT', 'STYLE', 'META', 'LINK', 'NOSCRIPT', 'HEAD', 'SVG', 'PATH'];
618	        if (skipPv.includes(element.tagName)) {
619	            return false;
620	        }
621	        try {
622	            const st = window.getComputedStyle(element);
623	            if (st.display === 'none' || st.visibility === 'hidden' || parseFloat(st.opacity) === 0) {
624	                return false;
625	            }
626	        } catch (ePv) {}
627	        const rolePv = (element.getAttribute('role') || '').toLowerCase();
628	        if (rolePv === 'alert' || rolePv === 'status' || rolePv === 'log') {
629	            return true;
630	        }
631	        if (element.hasAttribute('aria-live')) {
632	            return true;
633	        }
634	        const cnPv = (element.className && typeof element.className === 'string') ? element.className : '';
635	        if (/message|toast|notification|notify|alert|error|fail|warning|tip|feedback|snackbar|banner|invalid|danger|success|form-error|help-text|desc|exception|hint/i.test(cnPv)) {
636	            return true;
637	        }
638	        const textyPv = ['P', 'LI', 'TD', 'TH', 'H1', 'H2', 'H3', 'H4', 'H5', 'H6', 'PRE', 'FIGCAPTION', 'BLOCKQUOTE', 'DD', 'DT', 'SECTION', 'ASIDE', 'MAIN', 'MARK', 'INS', 'DEL'];
639	        const tPv = (element.innerText || element.textContent || '').trim();
640	        if (textyPv.includes(element.tagName) && tPv.length >= 1 && tPv.length <= 600) {
641	            return true;
642	        }
643	        if ((element.tagName === 'DIV' || element.tagName === 'SPAN') && tPv.length >= 1 && tPv.length <= 320 && element.children.length === 0) {
644	            return true;
645	        }
646	        return false;
647	    }
648	"""

653	).replace(

656	    1,

719	# 选择器池：抽取 label + selector 列表，供大模型从池中选取
720	_extract_selector_pool_script = """
721	() => {
722	    function getXPath(element) {
723	        if (element === document.documentElement) {
724	            return '/html';
725	        }
726	        if (element === document.body) {
727	            return '/html/body';
728	        }
729	        if (element.id && element.id !== '') {
730	            return '//*[@id="' + element.id.replace(/"/g, '\\\\"') + '"]';
731	        }
732	        if (!element.parentNode || !element.parentNode.childNodes) {
733	            return '';
734	        }
735	        let ix = 0;
736	        const siblings = element.parentNode.childNodes;
737	        for (let i = 0; i < siblings.length; i++) {
738	            const s = siblings[i];
739	            if (s === element) {
740	                return getXPath(element.parentNode) + '/' + element.tagName.toLowerCase() + '[' + (ix + 1) + ']';
741	            }
742	            if (s.nodeType === 1 && s.tagName === element.tagName) ix++;
743	        }
744	    }
745	    function isRelevantElement(element) {
746	        const skipTags = ['SCRIPT', 'STYLE', 'META', 'LINK', 'NOSCRIPT', 'HEAD'];
747	        if (skipTags.includes(element.tagName)) return false;
748	        const interactiveTags = ['BUTTON', 'INPUT', 'SELECT', 'TEXTAREA', 'A', 'LABEL', 'SUMMARY', 'DETAILS', 'MENU', 'MENUITEM'];
749	        if (interactiveTags.includes(element.tagName)) return true;
750	        if (element.hasAttribute('data-testid')) return true;
751	        const ariaAttrs = ['aria-label', 'aria-labelledby', 'aria-describedby', 'role'];
752	        for (const attr of ariaAttrs) { if (element.hasAttribute(attr)) return true; }
753	
754	        // 无文本但可点击的容器（如 create-button / icon button）
755	        if (element.tagName === 'DIV' || element.tagName === 'SPAN') {
756	            const cn = (element.className && typeof element.className === 'string') ? element.className : '';
757	            if (/(^|\\s)(create|new|add|plus|btn|button|action|operate|toolbar|icon)(-|_|\\b)/i.test(cn)) return true;
758	        }
759	        const text = (element.innerText || element.textContent || '').trim();
760	        if (text.length > 0 && text.length <= 500) {
761	            const decorativeTags = ['DIV', 'SPAN'];
762	            if (decorativeTags.includes(element.tagName)) {
763	                if (element.id || element.hasAttribute('data-testid') || element.getAttribute('role')) return true;
764	                const cn = (element.className && typeof element.className === 'string') ? element.className : '';
765	                if (/title|name|header|card|selectable|label|content|item|desc|text|trigger|link|btn|button|action|operate|toolbar|icon|create|new|add|plus/i.test(cn)) return true;
766	                return false;
767	            }
768	            return true;
769	        }
770	        return false;
771	    }
772	    function escapeDq(s) {
773	        if (s == null) return '';
774	        return String(s).replace(/\\\\/g, '\\\\\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\\\"');
775	    }
776	    function escapeAttr(s) {
777	        if (s == null) return '';
778	        return String(s).replace(/\\\\/g, '\\\\\\\\').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
779	    }
780	    function buildSelector(element) {
781	        const tag = element.tagName.toLowerCase();
782	        const id = element.id && element.id.trim();
783	        if (id) return '#' + id;
784	        const testId = element.getAttribute('data-testid');
785	        if (testId) return '[data-testid="' + escapeAttr(testId) + '"]';
786	        if (tag === 'input' || tag === 'textarea') {
787	            const ph = element.getAttribute('placeholder');
788	            if (ph) return tag + '[placeholder="' + escapeAttr(ph) + '"]';
789	            const name = element.getAttribute('name');
790	            if (name) return tag + '[name="' + escapeAttr(name) + '"]';
791	        }
792	        const text = (element.innerText || element.textContent || '').trim();
793	        if (text.length > 0 && text.length <= 200) {
794	            if (tag === 'button') return 'button:has-text("' + escapeDq(text) + '")';
795	            if (tag === 'a') return 'a:has-text("' + escapeDq(text) + '")';
796	            // span/div 用 text= 选择器，与 Playwright 录制 getByText 一致，可点击性更好
797	            if (tag === 'span' || tag === 'div') return 'text="' + escapeDq(text) + '"';
798	        }
799	        return 'xpath=' + getXPath(element);
800	    }
801	    function getLabel(element) {
802	        const aria = element.getAttribute('aria-label');
803	        if (aria && aria.trim()) return aria.trim();
804	        const text = (element.innerText || element.textContent || '').trim();
805	        if (text.length > 0) return text.length <= 200 ? text : text.substring(0, 200) + '...';
806	        return '';
807	    }
808	    // 卡片容器 div 本身不触发点击，只有内部的 title span 可点击；跳过容器，只保留 span
809	    function isCardContainerWithClickableTitle(element) {
810	        if (element.tagName !== 'DIV') return false;
811	        const cn = (element.className && typeof element.className === 'string') ? element.className : '';
812	        if (!/card-selectable|knowledge-child__card/i.test(cn)) return false;
813	        const title = element.querySelector('span.card-selectable__header-right-title, [class*="header-right-title"]');
814	        return !!title;
815	    }
816	    const result = [];
817	    const visited = new Set();
818	    function traverse(el) {
819	        if (!el || visited.has(el)) return;
820	        visited.add(el);
821	        if (isRelevantElement(el)) {
822	            if (isCardContainerWithClickableTitle(el)) { /* 跳过卡片容器，只加入内部 span */ }
823	            else {
824	                const label = getLabel(el);
825	                const selector = buildSelector(el);
826	                if (selector) result.push({ label: label || selector, selector: selector, tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase() });
827	            }
828	        }
829	        const children = el.children || [];
830	        for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) traverse(children[i]);
831	    }
832	    if (document.body) traverse(document.body);
833	    return result;
834	}
835	"""
836	
837	
838	__all__ = [
839	    "extract",
840	    "extract_all_dom_for_post_verify",
841	    "extract_for_post_verify",
842	    "extract_selector_pool",
843	    "wait_dom_stable",
844	]
845
```

```text
1	"""元素定位长期记忆库
2	
3	记录经过验证的成功 selector 模式，跨批次、跨天持续生效，
4	减少 LLM 调用和 DOM 提取次数。
5	
6	三级查找链：
7	    cache（短期，30min TTL）→ memory（长期，无 TTL）→ LLM 全量解析
8	
9	生命周期规则：
10	- 无 TTL：条目不过期
11	- 成功 +1：每次 lookup 命中且验证可用，或 put 写入时
12	- 失败 -1：post_verify 失败时 record_failure
13	- 删除：success_count 降到 0 立即删除
14	- 压缩：每次 save_to_file 时，删除 success_count <= 1 且 created_at 超过 14 天的条目
15	- 冲突处理：LLM 产生新 selector 与记忆不同 → 覆盖旧 selector，success_count 重置为 1
16	"""
17	
18	from __future__ import annotations
19	
20	import json
21	import logging
22	import re
23	import time
24	from pathlib import Path
25	from typing import Any, Dict, Optional
26	
27	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
28	
29	# 记忆库文件存储目录
30	_MEMORY_DIR_NAME = "selector_memory"
31	
32	# intent 松弛归一化最大长度
33	_INTENT_RELAXED_MAX_LEN = 60
34	
35	# 压缩阈值：success_count <= 1 且 created_at 超过此秒数则删除
36	_COMPRESS_STALE_SECONDS = 14 * 24 * 3600  # 14 天
37	
38	
39	def _normalize_intent_relaxed(intent: str) -> str:
40	    """松弛归一化 intent：小写 + 去空格 + 去中文引号 + 去末尾标点 + 截断"""
41	    s = re.sub(r"\s+", "", intent.lower())
42	    s = re.sub(r"[「」『』\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019]", "", s)
43	    s = re.sub(r"[。，、；：！？.,;:!?]+$", "", s)
44	    return s[:_INTENT_RELAXED_MAX_LEN]
45	
46	
47	def _build_memory_key(page_url: str, action_type: str, intent: str) -> str:
48	    """构建记忆库 key: normalized_route|action_type|relaxed_intent"""
49	    from src.ui.runtime.url_normalizer import normalize_page_url
50	
51	    relaxed = _normalize_intent_relaxed(intent)
52	    url_path = normalize_page_url(page_url)
53	    return f"{url_path}|{action_type}|{relaxed}"
54	
55	
56	def _build_node_signature(node: Optional[Dict[str, Any]]) -> Dict[str, str]:
57	    """从 semantic_dom 节点提取特征签名"""
58	    if not node:
59	        return {}
60	    tag = str(node.get("tag") or "").lower()
61	    text = str(node.get("text") or "").strip()[:80]
62	    raw_class = str(node.get("class") or "")
63	    class_parts = [c for c in raw_class.split() if c and not c.startswith("_") and len(c) > 1]
64	    class_pattern = " ".join(class_parts[:2]) if class_parts else ""
65	    role = str(node.get("role") or "").strip()
66	    return {
67	        "tag": tag,
68	        "text": text,
69	        "role": role,
70	        "class_pattern": class_pattern,
71	    }
72	
73	
74	def _url_path(url: str) -> str:
75	    """提取 URL 的归一化路由"""
76	    from src.ui.runtime.url_normalizer import normalize_page_url
77	
78	    return normalize_page_url(url)

81	class SelectorMemory:
82	    """元素定位长期记忆库"""
83	
84	    def __init__(self) -> None:
85	        # 页面级条目，key = url_path|action_type|relaxed_intent
86	        self._store: Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]] = {}
87	        # 组件级模式，key = component_library|component_type
88	        self._generic_store: Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]] = {}
89	        # 命中率统计
90	        self._stats_lookups: int = 0
91	        self._stats_hits: int = 0
92	
93	    # ── 页面级查找 ──────────────────────────────────────────
94	
95	    def lookup(
96	        self,
97	        page: Any,
98	        page_url: str,
99	        action_type: str,
100	        intent: str,
101	    ) -> Optional[str]:
102	        """
103	        页面级查找 → 验证可用性 → 命中且可用则返回 selector；
104	        命中但不可用则 record_failure 内部处理，返回 None。
105	        """
106	        key = _build_memory_key(page_url, action_type, intent)
107	        self._stats_lookups += 1
108	        entry = self._store.get(key)
109	        if entry is None:
110	            logger.debug(
111	                "selector_memory MISS | key=%s",
112	                key[:120],
113	            )
114	            return None
115	
116	        selector = entry["selector"]
117	        success_count = entry.get("success_count", 0)
118	        logger.info(
119	            "selector_memory HIT | key=%s | selector=%s | success_count=%d",
120	            key[:120], selector[:120], success_count,
121	        )
122	        self._stats_hits += 1
123	
124	        # 验证 selector 在当前页面是否仍可用
125	        if self._validate_selector(page, selector):
126	            entry["success_count"] = success_count + 1
127	            entry["updated_at"] = time.time()
128	            logger.info(
129	                "selector_memory VALID | selector=%s | success_count=%d",
130	                selector[:120], entry["success_count"],
131	            )
132	            return selector
133	
134	        # 命中但不可用，视为失败：只做 -1 而非调用 record_failure
135	        # （record_failure 内部再查一次 key 并 -1，加上本次未 increment，等于 -2）
136	        entry["success_count"] = max(entry.get("success_count", 1) - 1, 0)
137	        entry["updated_at"] = time.time()
138	        if entry["success_count"] <= 0:
139	            logger.info(
140	                "selector_memory EVICT | key=%s | selector=%s | success_count 降为 0",
141	                key[:120], selector[:120],
142	            )
143	            self._store.pop(key, None)
144	        else:
145	            logger.info(
146	                "selector_memory INVALID | selector=%s | success_count=%d (验证失败 -1)",
147	                selector[:120], entry["success_count"],
148	            )
149	        return None
150	
151	    # ── 页面级写入 ──────────────────────────────────────────
152	
153	    def put(
154	        self,
155	        page_url: str,
156	        action_type: str,
157	        intent: str,
158	        selector: str,
159	        node: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
160	        selector_type: str = "css",
161	        component_library: str = "unknown",
162	    ) -> None:
163	        """写入或更新页面级条目"""
164	        if not selector or selector in ("body", "TOAST_SEARCH", "NEGATIVE_ASSERT", "__SKIP_MENU_NAVIGATION__"):
165	            return
166	
167	        key = _build_memory_key(page_url, action_type, intent)
168	        entry = self._store.get(key)
169	        now = time.time()
170	
171	        if entry and entry["selector"] == selector:
172	            # lookup 已在验证成功时 +1，此处仅更新时间戳
173	            entry["updated_at"] = now
174	            logger.debug(
175	                "selector_memory PUT (same selector, lookup already counted) | key=%s | success_count=%d",
176	                key[:120], entry.get("success_count", 0),
177	            )
178	        else:
179	            # 新条目或 selector 不同 → 覆盖并重置
180	            self._store[key] = {
181	                "selector": selector,
182	                "selector_type": selector_type,
183	                "component_library": component_library,
184	                "node_signature": _build_node_signature(node),
185	                "page_url": page_url,
186	                "success_count": 1,
187	                "created_at": now,
188	                "updated_at": now,
189	            }
190	            logger.debug(
191	                "selector_memory PUT (new/overwrite) | key=%s | selector=%s",
192	                key[:120], selector[:120],
193	            )
194	
195	    # ── 组件级写入 ──────────────────────────────────────────
196	
197	    def put_generic(
198	        self,
199	        component_library: str,
200	        component_type: str,
201	        selector_template: str,
202	        selector_type: str = "css",
203	    ) -> None:
204	        """写入组件级通用模式"""
205	        if not selector_template or not component_library or not component_type:
206	            return
207	
208	        key = f"{component_library}|{component_type}"
209	        entry = self._generic_store.get(key)
210	        now = time.time()
211	
212	        if entry and entry["selector_template"] == selector_template:
213	            entry["success_count"] = entry.get("success_count", 0) + 1
214	            entry["updated_at"] = now
215	        else:
216	            self._generic_store[key] = {
217	                "selector_template": selector_template,
218	                "selector_type": selector_type,
219	                "component_library": component_library,
220	                "component_type": component_type,
221	                "success_count": 1,
222	                "created_at": now,
223	                "updated_at": now,
224	            }
225	        logger.debug(
226	            "selector_memory PUT_GENERIC | key=%s | selector_template=%s",
227	            key[:120], selector_template[:120],
228	        )
229	
230	    # ── 失败记录 ────────────────────────────────────────────
231	
232	    def record_failure(
233	        self,
234	        page_url: str,
235	        action_type: str,
236	        intent: str,
237	    ) -> None:
238	        """success_count -1；降到 0 则删除条目"""
239	        key = _build_memory_key(page_url, action_type, intent)
240	        entry = self._store.get(key)
241	        if entry is None:
242	            return
243	
244	        entry["success_count"] = entry.get("success_count", 0) - 1
245	        entry["updated_at"] = time.time()
246	
247	        if entry["success_count"] <= 0:
248	            self._store.pop(key, None)
249	            logger.info(
250	                "selector_memory REMOVED | key=%s | reason=success_count<=0",
251	                key[:120],
252	            )
253	        else:
254	            logger.debug(
255	                "selector_memory DECREMENT | key=%s | success_count=%d",
256	                key[:120], entry["success_count"],
257	            )
258	
259	    # ── 验证 ────────────────────────────────────────────────
260	
261	    @staticmethod
262	    def _validate_selector(page: Any, selector: str) -> bool:
263	        """验证 selector 在当前页面是否匹配到至少 1 个可见元素"""
264	        if not page or not selector:
265	            return False
266	        try:
267	            count = page.locator(selector).count()
268	            if count >= 1:
269	                visible = page.locator(selector).first.is_visible()
270	                return bool(visible)
271	            return False
272	        except Exception:
273	            return False
274	
275	    # ── 压缩 ────────────────────────────────────────────────
276	
277	    def _compress(self) -> None:
278	        """删除 success_count <= 1 且 created_at 超过 14 天的条目"""
279	        now = time.time()
280	        stale_threshold = now - _COMPRESS_STALE_SECONDS
281	
282	        # 页面级压缩
283	        stale_keys = [
284	            k for k, v in self._store.items()
285	            if v.get("success_count", 0) <= 1
286	            and v.get("created_at", 0) < stale_threshold
287	        ]
288	        for k in stale_keys:
289	            self._store.pop(k, None)
290	
291	        # 组件级压缩
292	        stale_generic_keys = [
293	            k for k, v in self._generic_store.items()
294	            if v.get("success_count", 0) <= 1
295	            and v.get("created_at", 0) < stale_threshold
296	        ]
297	        for k in stale_generic_keys:
298	            self._generic_store.pop(k, None)
299	
300	        total_removed = len(stale_keys) + len(stale_generic_keys)
301	        if total_removed:
302	            logger.info(
303	                "selector_memory COMPRESS | removed=%d (page=%d, generic=%d)",
304	                total_removed, len(stale_keys), len(stale_generic_keys),
305	            )
306	
307	    # ── 持久化 ──────────────────────────────────────────────
308	
309	    def save_to_file(self, output_dir: Path) -> None:
310	        """持久化到 JSON 文件，保存前压缩"""
311	        self._compress()
312	
313	        memory_dir = output_dir / _MEMORY_DIR_NAME
314	        try:
315	            memory_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
316	            memory_file = memory_dir / "selector_memory.json"
317	            data = {
318	                "version": 1,
319	                "saved_at": time.time(),
320	                "page_entries": self._store,
321	                "generic_entries": self._generic_store,
322	            }
323	            memory_file.write_text(
324	                json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
325	                encoding="utf-8",
326	            )
327	            logger.info(
328	                "selector_memory SAVED | file=%s | page_entries=%d | generic_entries=%d",
329	                memory_file, len(self._store), len(self._generic_store),
330	            )
331	        except Exception as e:
332	            logger.warning("selector_memory 保存失败: %s", e)
333	
334	    def load_from_file(self, output_dir: Path) -> None:
335	        """从 JSON 文件加载，过滤掉 success_count <= 0 的条目"""
336	        memory_file = output_dir / _MEMORY_DIR_NAME / "selector_memory.json"
337	        if not memory_file.exists():
338	            logger.debug("selector_memory 无历史记忆文件: %s", memory_file)
339	            return
340	
341	        try:
342	            raw = memory_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
343	            data = json.loads(raw)
344	
345	            # 加载页面级条目
346	            page_entries = data.get("page_entries") or {}
347	            page_loaded = 0
348	            for k, v in page_entries.items():
349	                if v.get("success_count", 0) > 0:
350	                    self._store[k] = v
351	                    page_loaded += 1
352	
353	            # 加载组件级条目
354	            generic_entries = data.get("generic_entries") or {}
355	            generic_loaded = 0
356	            for k, v in generic_entries.items():
357	                if v.get("success_count", 0) > 0:
358	                    self._generic_store[k] = v
359	                    generic_loaded += 1
360	
361	            logger.info(
362	                "selector_memory LOADED | file=%s | page_valid=%d/%d | generic_valid=%d/%d",
363	                memory_file, page_loaded, len(page_entries),
364	                generic_loaded, len(generic_entries),
365	            )
366	        except Exception as e:
367	            logger.warning("selector_memory 加载失败: %s", e)
368	
369	    # ── 统计 ────────────────────────────────────────────────
370	
371	    @property
372	    def size(self) -> int:
373	        return len(self._store) + len(self._generic_store)
374	
375	    @property
376	    def stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
377	        """记忆库命中率统计。"""
378	        lookups = self._stats_lookups or 1
379	        return {
380	            "lookups": self._stats_lookups,
381	            "hits": self._stats_hits,
382	            "misses": self._stats_lookups - self._stats_hits,
383	            "hit_rate": round(self._stats_hits / lookups * 100, 1),
384	            "entries": len(self._store),
385	            "generic_entries": len(self._generic_store),
386	        }
387	
388	    @property
389	    def page_size(self) -> int:
390	        return len(self._store)
391	
392	    @property
393	    def generic_size(self) -> int:
394	        return len(self._generic_store)
395
```

_**Agent - sidechain (zyb-fast 2026-06-18 05:42:48Z)**_

I now have a thorough understanding of the codebase. Here is my comprehensive analysis:

---

## 1. Overall Architecture and Execution Flow

The project is an **AI-driven UI automation testing framework** (v3) where test cases are written in Chinese Markdown, and the system automatically handles browser interaction, login, navigation, action planning, element locating, execution, and reporting.

**Entry point:** `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/run.py`

**Execution pipeline (15 steps):**

```
Markdown parse (step 1) -> Sort (step 3) -> Precondition expand (step 2)
-> Login (step 4) -> Navigate (step 5) -> Action plan via LLM (step 6)
-> Intent split via LLM (step 7) -> Semantic DOM snapshot (step 8)
-> 5-level element locating (step 9) -> Readiness check (step 10)
-> Action dispatch (step 11) -> Post-check (step 12) -> Retry (step 13)
-> Orchestration (step 14) -> Report + codegen (step 15)
```

**Core orchestrator:** `UITestAgent` in `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/agent.py` which wires together all components: LLM adapter, planner, splitter, navigator, locator resolver, readiness checker, post-checker, retry controller, and Playwright runner.

**Key architectural files:**
- `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/agent.py` - Main orchestrator
- `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/planning/action_planner.py` - LLM action planning
- `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/execution/dispatcher.py` - Action dispatch to Playwright
- `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/execution/runner.py` - Execution loop with readiness/retry

---

## 2. How It Currently Handles DOM Element Selection/Locating

The framework uses a **5-level fallback chain** (五级定位链), implemented in `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/locating/resolver.py`:

| Level | Component | File | Speed | Hit Rate |
|-------|-----------|------|-------|----------|
| L1 | Selector Cache (in-memory, 30min TTL) | `cache.py` | Fastest | ~30% |
| L2 | Selector Memory (file-persisted, 10-day TTL, scoring) | `memory.py` | Fast | ~20% |
| L3 | Rule Engine (11 regex-based intent rules) | `rule_engine.py` | Fast | ~35% |
| L4 | Structure Learner (Jaccard similarity > 0.6) | `structure_learner.py` | Medium | ~5% |
| L5 | LLM Element Decider | `llm_decider.py` | Slowest | ~10% |

**The resolver flow (`resolver.py` lines 57-169):**
1. Key = `(normalized URL, action type, normalized intent)`
2. L1 cache lookup -> validate selector visible on page -> return if hit; if stale, try self-heal; if heal fails, evict and downgrade
3. L2 memory lookup -> validate -> return if hit (with score > 0)
4. L3 rule engine -> regex match intent against 11 rules -> build candidate selectors -> try each until one is visible
5. L4 structure learner -> find similar intent on same route+action_type (Jaccard > 0.6) -> validate -> return
6. L5 LLM decider -> extract DOM with numbered elements -> send to LLM with DOM + intent -> LLM returns element index -> build selector from DOM element properties

**DOM extraction (`semantic_dom.py`):**
- Executes JavaScript in the browser to traverse DOM
- Extracts meaningful elements: `a, button, input, textarea, select, [role], [data-testid]`, containers, dropdowns, options
- Supports framework-specific selectors (Ant Design, Element UI, etc.) injected from `skill.md`
- Dialog/form elements are prioritized at the front of the list
- Returns a `DomIndex` with numbered text + selector list for each element

**Playwright API mapping (`playwright_api.py`):**
- Prioritizes semantic APIs: `get_by_label`, `get_by_role`, `get_by_text`, `get_by_placeholder`, `get_by_test_id`
- Falls back to `page.locator(css_selector)`
- Old data with only `selector` field is auto-inferred to determine method

---

## 3. Component-Aware Selector Logic

**Yes, the framework has component-aware selector logic at multiple levels:**

### 3a. Skill Knowledge (`skill.md` at `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/prompts/skill.md`)
- Defines component HTML structures for: el-select, cascader (region), el-tree, el-checkbox, el-switch, el-dialog, product cards
- **Framework detection** via CSS probes: ant-design, element-plus, element-ui, naive-ui, arco-design
- **Framework-specific selectors** for each framework's containers, dropdowns, options, dialogs, forms

### 3b. Rule Engine (`rule_engine.py` lines 54-203)
The rule engine has **11 rules** with component-aware selectors:

| Rule | Intent Pattern | Selectors Generated |
|------|---------------|---------------------|
| 下拉选项 | "下拉选项", "弹出选项" | `role=option`, `.ant-select-item-option`, `[role="listbox"][role="option"]`, `.el-select-dropdown__item`, `li` |
| 地区级联触发器 | "下拉框"+省份/城市/区县 | `:nth-match(.el-select__wrapper, N)` |
| 用户菜单悬停 | "悬浮"+"用户"/"菜单" | `[role="button"][haspopup="menu"]`, `.el-dropdown [role="button"]` |
| 下拉触发器 | "下拉框", "下拉菜单", "筛选器" | `get_by_label`, `role=combobox`, `.ant-form-item:has(label) .ant-select`, `.el-form-item .el-select__wrapper` |
| 可筛选下拉 | "筛选下拉", "下拉框输入" | `.el-select__input`, `[role="combobox"]` |
| 按标签输入 | "输入框", "填写", "输入" | `get_by_placeholder`, `.el-form-item:has-text input`, `input[placeholder*]` |
| 树形复选框 | "勾选"+"树"+"复选框" | `.el-tree-node:has-text .el-checkbox`, `[role="treeitem"] [role="checkbox"]` |
| 复选框 | "勾选", "复选框" | `[role="checkbox"]:near(:text)`, `label:has-text input[type="checkbox"]` |
| 树节点 | "展开/收起"+"树节点" | `.el-tree-node:has-text .el-tree-node__expand-icon` |
| 开关 | "开关", "switch" | `.el-switch`, `.ant-switch` |
| 关闭弹窗 | "关闭"+"弹窗" | `role=button name="Close"`, `.el-dialog__headerbtn`, `.ant-modal-close` |
| 按钮点击 | "点击"+"按钮" | `role=button`, `button:has-text`, `.el-button:has-text` |
| 通用文本点击 | "点击"/"选择"/"关闭" (非下拉) | `role=button`, `role=link`, `text=exact`, `button:has-text`, `a:has-text` |

### 3c. DOM Snapshot Framework Selectors (`semantic_dom.py`)
When a framework is detected, framework-specific selectors are used for:
- `container_sel`: e.g., `.ant-select, .ant-picker` vs `.el-select`
- `dropdown_sel`: e.g., `.ant-select-dropdown` vs `.el-select-dropdown`
- `option_sel`: e.g., `.ant-select-item-option` vs `.el-select-dropdown__item`
- `dialog_sel`: e.g., `.ant-modal` vs `.el-dialog`
- `form_sel`: e.g., `.ant-form` vs `.el-form`

### 3d. Dispatcher combobox handling (`dispatcher.py` lines 249-269)
Special handling for combobox role elements: walks ancestor XPath to find nearest `.ant-select`/`.el-select` container and clicks that instead of the inner element.

## 4. Frontend Framework, Selectors Used, and Failure Patterns

### Frontend Framework
**Primary framework: Ant Design (Ant Design Pro)** -- evidenced by:
- Target URL pattern: `https://www-gwp11-bc.suanshubang.com/video/*`
- DOM snapshots showing `ant-pro-base-menu-inline-item-text`, `ant-select`, `ant-btn`, `ant-menu-item`, `ant-select-item-option`, `ant-select-dropdown`
- Memory library showing selectors like `.ant-select-dropdown:visible .ant-select-item-option:has-text("策略")` and `role=link[name="待前审"]`
- `ant-select-selection-search-input` with `role="combobox"`
- Framework detection rules in skill.md cover ant-design first

**Secondary (historical): Element UI** -- the `智能加速/页面结构学习.json` contains many `.el-select`, `.el-dialog`, `.el-checkbox` selectors from the e-commerce demo test system.

### Selectors Actually Used (from memory library and execution traces)
The most common selector patterns:

| Selector Pattern | Example | Source |
|-----------------|---------|--------|
| `role=link[name="..."]` | `role=link[name="全部题目"]` | L2 memory |
| `role=button[name="..."]` | `role=button[name="领取"]` | L2 memory |
| `label:"..."` | `label:"来源"` | L2 memory |
| `text:exact:"..."` | `text:exact:"待前审"` | L2/L3 |
| `.ant-select-dropdown:visible .ant-select-item-option:has-text("...")` | Dropdown option selection | L2 memory |
| `button:has-text("提 交")` | Submit button | L4 learning |
| `role=menuitem[name="..."]` | Sidebar menu items | L5 LLM |
| `role=combobox` (via label method) | Select triggers | L2 memory |

### Failure Patterns (from execution traces)

**Pattern 1: Menu item not found on sidebar**
From `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/输出/UI测试/20260613_090014/vip_前审_004/执行追踪.json`:
- The test case asked to "点击侧栏菜单进入'提交审核'页面" but no "提交审核" menu item existed
- Visible menus were: 欢迎, 待前审, 已审核, 大学数据看板, 个人中心, 培训中心
- LLM kept trying different menus (待前审, 个人中心) across 5 retry attempts, all failing post-check
- Root cause: **Test case intent did not match actual menu structure** -- LLM-generated navigation step was incorrect

**Pattern 2: LLM returning index=-1 (not found)**
Multiple instances in traces where L5 LLM returns `{"index": -1}` after the exclude list grows, meaning all plausible candidates were excluded and no valid alternative remained.

**Pattern 3: Post-check identifying wrong element clicked**
Post-check (`post_check` phase in traces) frequently catches cases where:
- The click dispatch succeeded (element found and clicked)
- But post-check LLM determines the wrong element was clicked based on `target_html` and current page state
- This triggers retry with `resolve_hint` to guide the next attempt

**Pattern 4: Selector staleness**
The memory library shows selectors like `role=button[name="提 交"]` (with space in "提 交") matching actual button text `<span>提 交</span>`, showing the system learns exact text variants.

## 5. Test Cases and How They Specify Element Locators

**Test cases do NOT specify any element locators.** This is a core design principle.

Test cases in `/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/natural_cases/` are pure natural language Markdown:

**Example from `add_address.md`:**
```markdown
##### 操作步骤
- 鼠标悬浮在页面右上角的用户菜单按钮 "15373137739" 上
- 点击菜单中的 "收货地址" 选项
- 点击 "添加新地址" 按钮
- 在 "收件人" 输入框输入 "张三"
- 在 "联系电话" 输入框输入 "15373137739"
- 点击省份下拉框
- 在弹出选项中点击 "广东省"
```

**Example from `shop_scenario.md`:**
```markdown
##### 操作步骤
- 点击 "全部商品分类"
- 点击分类为 "家电 数码 手机"
- 在商品预览页中筛选出的商品卡片中点击第一个 "小米 Redmi AirDots"
```

**The flow is:**
1. Natural language step -> LLM action planner outputs `{type: "click", intent: "点击'添加新地址'按钮"}` -- no selector
2. Intent splitter may further break compound actions
3. At execution time, the semantic DOM is extracted from the live page
4. The 5-level locator chain resolves the intent to an actual Playwright selector
5. The selector is used to perform the action

The `PlannedAction` model (`/Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/planning/action_schema.py`) explicitly has no locator fields from the planner -- `selector`, `locator_info`, `force_selector`, `exclude_selectors`, and `resolve_hint` are all runtime-only fields populated during execution.

## Complete Analysis: UI Automation v3 Skill System

### 1. Skill Scripts Overview

The skill system consists of **one skill package** (`general_component_library_skill`) containing **9 executable entrypoints** (scripts), plus a shared helper library and an SKILL.md descriptor.

#### Directory Structure

```
src/ui/skills/
  general_component_library_skill/
    __init__.py                    # Package docstring: when to enable
    SKILL.md                       # YAML frontmatter + LLM guidance
    scripts/
      ui_dom_helpers.py            # Core shared library (all logic lives here)
      choose_best_click_target.py   # Entrypoint wrapper
      choose_best_input_target.py   # Entrypoint wrapper
      choose_best_checkbox_target.py # Entrypoint wrapper
      find_switch_in_row.py        # Entrypoint wrapper
      build_dropdown_option_selector.py   # Entrypoint wrapper
      build_checkbox_selector.py            # Entrypoint wrapper
      build_tree_checkbox_selector.py       # Entrypoint wrapper
      build_tree_node_selector.py           # Entrypoint wrapper
      build_el_select_trigger_selector.py   # Entrypoint wrapper
  loader.py                        # Skill discovery, frontmatter parsing, prompt injection
```

#### The 9 Entrypoints (from SKILL.md frontmatter)

| Entrypoint | Kind | Purpose | Category |
|---|---|---|---|
| `choose_best_input_target` | python script | Fill input box correction (2A) | Node Selection |
| `find_switch_in_row` | python script | Locate toggle/switch inside a table row (2A) | Node Selection |
| `choose_best_click_target` | python script | Click target correction (2A) | Node Selection |
| `choose_best_checkbox_target` | python script | Checkbox proximity correction (2A) | Node Selection |
| `build_dropdown_option_selector` | python script | Build dropdown option selector (2B) | Selector Builder |
| `build_checkbox_selector` | python script | Build non-tree checkbox selector (2B) | Selector Builder |
| `build_tree_checkbox_selector` | python script | Build tree checkbox selector (2B) | Selector Builder |
| `build_tree_node_selector` | python script | Build tree node expand/collapse selector (2B) | Selector Builder |
| `build_el_select_trigger_selector` | python script | Build el-select/ant-select trigger selector (2B) | Selector Builder |

### 2. How Selectors Are Dynamically Generated for Complex DOM Structures

The system uses a **two-phase strategy** labeled "2A" (node selection refinement) and "2B" (selector construction).

#### Phase 2A: Node Selection Refinement (returns a refined `node_index`)

These scripts take a `base_node_index` (the node the LLM initially identified as semantically correct) and refine it by examining ancestors and descendants within the semantic DOM.

**`choose_best_click_target`** (`ui_dom_helpers.py` lines 155-229):
- Takes the base node and climbs up to 2-4 ancestors (4 for dropdown-related intents).
- Scores each candidate: button (+5), anchor (+3), role=button (+4), class keywords (+1 each).
- Special Element Plus handling: penalizes `.el-select__input-calculator` (-12, it's a hidden width-measuring span), rewards `.el-select__wrapper` (+6), rewards `.el-select__input` with role=combobox (+5).
- Returns the best-scoring node index.

**`choose_best_input_target`** (`ui_dom_helpers.py` lines 232-421):
- Takes the base node + its 2-level ancestors as anchors.
- BFS traverses up to 2 levels down from each anchor to collect candidates.
- If the semantic DOM lacks `parent_index` data, falls back to a global search across all input/textarea elements, discriminating by dialog vs search context using intent keywords.
- Scores by: tag=input/textarea (+5), role=textbox (+4), has placeholder (+1.5), has name (+1.0), keyword matching in placeholder/name (+0.5).

**`choose_best_checkbox_target`** (script lines 1-44): A simple proximity scan -- finds the nearest node (by index distance) whose class contains "checkbox" or role is "checkbox".

**`find_switch_in_row`** (`ui_dom_helpers.py` lines 991-1071):
- Extracts row key text from intent (e.g., "名称为 sample_row 这一行" -> "sample_row").
- Two-stage: (1) Tree-structure BFS from row candidate node through its ancestors' subtrees to find nodes with "switch" in class. (2) Fallback: picks the switch node with minimum index distance to the row text node.

#### Phase 2B: Selector Construction (returns an XPath/CSS selector string)

These scripts generate prioritized candidate selector lists (ordered from most specific to most generic).

**`build_dropdown_option_selector`** (`ui_dom_helpers.py` lines 493-605):
- Parses option text from intent using ~12 regex patterns (handles "在下拉选项中选择 X", "点击 X 下拉选项", etc.).
- Detects Ant Design in DOM (any class containing "ant-").
- Generates selectors in priority order:
  1. Ant Design-specific: `.ant-select-dropdown:visible .ant-select-item-option-content:has-text("X")`, `role=listbox >> .ant-select-item-option-content`, XPath variant
  2. Playwright role selectors: `role=option[name="X"]`, `role=menuitem`, `role=menuitemcheckbox`, `role=treeitem`
  3. XPath role selectors: `//*[@role='option' and contains(normalize-space(.), "X")]`
  4. Container-scoped: `//*[@role='listbox']//*[(@role='option'...)...]`
  5. Native select/option fallback
  6. Class keyword fallback: `*[contains(@class,'option')]`, Element UI specific: `li.el-select-dropdown__item`, `li.el-cascader-node`

**`build_el_select_trigger_selector`** (`ui_dom_helpers.py` lines 919-969):
- Extracts field label from intent (e.g., "弹窗中的分类标签下拉框" -> "分类标签") using ~13 regex patterns.
- If Ant Design detected: finds combobox id near matching label, generates selectors like `#{cid}`, XPath to ancestor `.ant-select`, `*[role='combobox']`, `.ant-select-arrow`.
- Always generates Element UI selectors prioritizing dialog context: `.el-select__wrapper` inside `.el-form-item` inside dialog/overlay, with XPath variants scoped to `[role='dialog']`, `.el-dialog`, `.el-overlay-dialog`.

**`build_checkbox_selector`** (`ui_dom_helpers.py` lines 630-704):
- Generates role-first selectors: `role=checkbox[name="X"]`, `role=menuitemcheckbox[name="X"]`, with XPath and class-based fallbacks.
- Explicitly excludes tree contexts: `not(ancestor::*[@role='tree' or @role='treeitem' or contains(@class,'tree')])`.

**`build_tree_checkbox_selector`** (`ui_dom_helpers.py` lines 711-785):
- More complex: anchors on text, finds ancestor treeitem, then locates checkbox within that treeitem.
- Generates selectors like: `(//*[contains(normalize-space(.), "X")]/ancestor::*[@role='treeitem'][1]//*[@role='checkbox'])[1]`.
- Handles tree-without-role=treeitem scenarios using class proximity: text node's ancestor containing both text and checkbox class.
- Specific selectors for Element UI (`span.el-checkbox__input`) and Ant Design (`span.ant-tree-checkbox`).

**`build_tree_node_selector`** (`ui_dom_helpers.py` lines 810-856):
- Targets the expand/collapse switcher icon, NOT the node text.
- Ant Tree: finds `ant-tree-treenode` containing `ant-tree-title` with exact text, then selects its `ant-tree-switcher` or SVG inside.
- Element/custom tree: finds `el-tree-node__content` with matching label, then selects `el-tree-node__expand-icon`.
- Generic: finds `treeitem` with matching text, selects switcher/expand-icon/caret elements.

### 3. Supported Frontend Frameworks

The SKILL.md `component_structures` section defines explicit HTML structure templates for:

| Framework | class_features | Components Defined |
|---|---|---|
| **ant-design** | `ant-` prefix | dropdown_option, checkbox, tree_checkbox, switch, select_trigger |
| **element-ui** | `el-` prefix | dropdown_option, checkbox, el_select_trigger, select_trigger |
| **generic** | (none) | dropdown_option (uses ARIA role=listbox/role=option) |

Additionally, the SKILL.md prose (section 4) documents DOM patterns for:
- **Element UI / Element Plus**: `.el-select`, `.el-select__wrapper`, `.el-select__input-calculator` (explicitly forbidden as click target), `.el-select-dropdown`, `.el-select-dropdown__item`, `.el-dialog`, `.v-modal`
- **Ant Design**: `.ant-select`, `.ant-select-selector`, `.ant-select-dropdown`, `.ant-select-item-option`, `.ant-modal`, `.ant-table`, `.ant-drawer`
- **Naive UI**: `.n-select`, `.n-base-selection`, `.n-base-select-menu`, `.n-modal`, `.n-drawer`, `.n-data-table`

The `ui_dom_helpers.py` code also contains framework-specific logic:
- Element Plus: `_detect_ant_design_from_dom()` function checks for "ant-" in classes
- Ant Design: `_combobox_ids_near_label()` finds combobox IDs near form labels

### 4. Entry Points and Test Execution Flow

#### Skill Loading and Prompt Injection

1. **At module load time** (`src/ui/modules/prompt_builder.py`):
   - `load_skill_text("general_component_library_skill")` reads the SKILL.md
   - `split_skill_md_frontmatter()` splits YAML frontmatter from prose body
   - `format_component_index_with_select_html()` generates a compact component index (select/dropdown/cascader components keep full HTML, others are name-only)
   - The prose + component index are injected into the Action Planner's system prompt

2. **At runtime** (`src/ui/runtime/element_resolver.py`):
   - `format_skills_for_prompt()` loads all skill frontmatters and formats a skill catalog into the Element Resolver's system prompt (lists skill names, descriptions, entrypoints, and adapted component libraries)
   - `load_all_skill_frontmatters()` scans `src/ui/skills/*/SKILL.md` files

#### Execution Chain

```
ui_test_agent.py
  -> creates ElementDecisionResolver(llm_client)  (line ~736-738)
     NOTE: run_script_executor is NOT injected, so external script execution via subprocess is skipped
  -> creates PlaywrightRunner(element_resolver=element_resolver, ...)
  -> for each test step:
     -> ActionDispatcher.resolve_selector()
        -> semantic_dom.extract(page)   # JavaScript in browser extracts meaningful elements
        -> element_resolver.resolve(semantic_dom, intent, action_type, ...)
           -> LLM call with system prompt containing skill descriptions
           -> LLM returns either:
              Format 1: {"target": {"node_index": N, ...}}
              Format 2A: {"use_skill": {"skill_name": "choose_best_click_target", "node_index": N, ...}}
              Format 2B: {"use_skill": {"skill_name": "build_el_select_trigger_selector", "component_library": "element-ui", "target_text": "X", ...}}
           -> _dispatch_skill_from_llm():
              - 2A skills: calls _invoke_skill_helper() which uses run_script_executor (subprocess). If not available, falls back.
              - 2B skills: calls _selector_from_build_helper() which directly imports from ui_dom_helpers.py (bypasses subprocess)
           -> If Format 1, _try_auto_skill_selector() proactively detects:
              - component type from intent keywords (select_trigger, dropdown_option, checkbox, tree_checkbox, tree_node)
              - component library from DOM class patterns (ant-design, element-ui)
              - Generates selectors via the same 2B helpers
           -> Returns {"node_index": N, "recommended_selector": "...", "component_library": "..."}
        -> ActionDispatcher validates recommended_selector, falls through to node_index-based locator if needed
        -> After successful execution: _maybe_write_cache() writes to selector_memory with _selector_from_skill flag
```

#### Key Architecture Decisions

1. **Direct import fallback for 2B scripts**: When `run_script_executor` is not injected (as in the current agent setup), 2B selector-build helpers are called directly via Python import from `ui_dom_helpers.py` rather than as subprocess scripts. The script wrapper files exist for the SKILL.md entrypoint convention but are bypassed.

2. **Three-tier selector strategy**: 
   - Tier 1: `selector_memory` (persistent JSON cache with success_count tracking)
   - Tier 2: `recommended_selector` from skill scripts
   - Tier 3: LLM-generated selector via `_build_selector_via_llm()` using component HTML templates from SKILL.md

3. **Two response formats**: The LLM can either directly return a node_index (Format 1) or request a specific skill (Format 2). If Format 1 is returned, the system proactively checks via `_try_auto_skill_selector()` whether a skill path would produce a better selector.

4. **The `parent_index` dependency**: Several helpers (`climb_ancestors`, `choose_best_input_target`, `find_switch_in_row`) rely on a `parent_index` field in semantic DOM nodes. This field is NOT populated by the current `semantic_dom.extract()` JavaScript -- it appears to be a planned extension or populated by external means.

**Current framework (ui_automation):**
- Has a solid 5-level locator chain (L1 cache → L2 memory → L3 rules → L4 learning → L5 LLM)
- Has component-aware logic in skill.md and rule_engine.py
- Detects Ant Design framework
- Has selector memory that persists successful selectors
- Target app is Ant Design Pro

**v3 framework skills:**
- More sophisticated selector builder scripts (2B) that generate highly specific XPath/CSS selectors


- Node selection refinement scripts (2A) for more precise targeting
- Better dynamic generation for complex components (el-select, cascader, tree checkbox, etc.)

Looking at the user's actual test execution, the framework is performing well overall—case 001 ran completely without issues, and case 002 had only one false negative where the post_check flagged a "提 交" button as "搜索" despite it working correctly, yet still passed the final assertion. The L2 memory is successfully storing and retrieving selectors, with the system effectively leveraging Ant Design-specific selectors.

The real question is whether adding v3's skill capability would meaningfully improve success rates. From the execution traces, the current framework is already performing well—most selectors hit L2 memory with proper Ant Design selectors, L5 LLM handles fallback cases competently, and failures tend to be semantic (like the 搜索 vs 提交 naming mismatch) rather than element locating issues. The main bottleneck I see is L5 being called too often when L2 misses happen on the first run, which adds latency and introduces some LLM decision instability.

The v3 skill scripts could help by replacing LLM calls with deterministic selector builders, particularly for complex components like nested dropdowns and cascading selects. But looking more carefully at what v3 actually does—it's a two-phase approach where 2A refines node selection based on semantic DOM context (like finding the best click target near specific text), and 2B constructs selectors from those refined nodes. The critical distinction is that v3 generates selectors dynamically from the actual DOM at runtime rather than relying on predefined patterns.

For Ant Design specifically, this matters because components like select cascades have complex DOM structures where the trigger and dropdown are separate DOM trees, checkboxes can be deeply nested in tree structures, and modals get portal-rendered. The current framework's rule engine does generate selectors but from fixed patterns, whereas v3 scripts would adapt to the actual page structure, making them more resilient to DOM changes and framework upgrades.

The real question is whether to integrate the v3 skill capability—given that the current framework already has skill.md with component knowledge and a 5-level locator chain, I should evaluate what gap actually exists and whether v3 would meaningfully fill it.

根据对两个框架的深入分析，给你一个大实话回答：

## 现状判断

**你的前端框架是 Ant Design Pro**（`ant-pro-base-menu`、`ant-select`、`ant-btn`、`ant-modal`），不是 Element UI。

**当前框架其实已经有大部分 skill 能力了**。我看了你的代码：

- `skill.md` 已经有 Ant Design / Element UI / Naive UI 的组件结构知识
- `rule_engine.py` 有 11 条组件感知规则（下拉选项、树形复选框、开关等）
- `semantic_dom.py` 会根据框架检测结果动态生成选择器
- `dispatcher.py` 有 combobox 特殊处理

## 执行成功率其实不错

从最新执行记录（20260618）看：

| case | 结果 | 定位命中层级 |
|------|------|-------------|
| vip_前审_001 | 全部通过 | L2 记忆命中 Ant 专用选择器 |
| vip_前审_002 | 最终通过 | 主要 L2 命中，少量 L5 LLM |

失败案例主要是**语义层面**的问题（比如 LLM 把"提交"按钮误判为"搜索"），不是选择器本身定位失败。

## v3 的 skill 值不值得加？

**值得，但不是必须。提升幅度取决于你的场景：**

v3 的核心差异是 **动态脚本生成选择器** vs 你当前的 **规则引擎生成选择器**：

| 对比项 | 当前框架 | v3 skill |
|--------|---------|----------|
| 选择器来源 | 11条正则规则硬编码 | 脚本根据实际 DOM 遍历+评分动态生成 |
| Ant 复杂组件 | 规则生成的选择器能覆盖大部分 | 会爬 ancestor 找最佳触发点 |
| DOM 变化适应性 | 需要手动更新规则 | 脚本自动适应 |

**对你的场景（Ant Design），最大的收益点是：**

1. **`choose_best_input_target`**：Ant Design 表单的 label → input 映射比 Element 复杂，你的框架用 `label:"X"` 方法，在 Ant 的 `ant-form-item` 结构里偶尔会找到错误的 input
2. **`build_dropdown_option_selector`**：你的 L2 记忆已经存了 `.ant-select-dropdown:visible .ant-select-item-option` 这类选择器，但首次访问（无记忆时）当前规则引擎生成的选择器不如 v3 脚本精准
3. **`find_switch_in_row`**：表格行内的 switch 操作，v3 会先定位行文本再找最近的 switch，当前框架没有这个逻辑

## 建议

**先别急着全量移植**，分两步：

1. **看数据说话** — 你跑 20-30 个 case，统计 L3/L5 定位的比例和失败率。如果 L3+L5 占比超过 30%，加 v3 skill 的收益会很明显
2. **优先移植 2B 选择器构建脚本** — `build_dropdown_option_selector` 和 `build_tree_checkbox_selector` 这两个对你的 Ant Design 场景性价比最高，可以直接插到当前 L3 规则引擎和 L5 LLM 之间作为 L4.5 层

```text
206	class RuleEngine:
207	    """基于固定规则的定位候选生成器, 位于 L3."""
208	
209	    def __init__(self) -> None:
210	        self.rules = sorted(_RULES, key=lambda r: r.priority)
211	
212	    def resolve(
213	        self,
214	        page: Any,
215	        intent: str,
216	        action_type: str,
217	        hint: Optional[str] = None,
218	        exclude: Optional[set[str]] = None,
219	    ) -> Optional[dict]:
220	        excl = exclude or set()
221	        hit = try_candidates(page, _hint_candidates(hint, action_type), excl)
222	        if hit:
223	            return hit
224	
225	        for rule in self.rules:
226	            if not rule.pattern(intent):
227	                continue
228	            hit = try_candidates(page, rule.build(intent), excl)
229	            if hit:
230	                return hit
231	        return None
232
```
